title: From Retinal Evidence to Safe Decisions: RETINA-SAFE and ECRT for Hallucination Risk Triage in Medical LLMs
summary: Hallucinations in medical large language models (LLMs) remain a safety-critical issue, particularly when available evidence is insufficient or conflicting. We study this problem in diabetic retinopathy (DR) decision settings and introduce RETINA-SAFE, an evidence-grounded benchmark aligned with retinal grading records, comprising 12,522 samples. RETINA-SAFE is organized into three evidence-relation tasks: E-Align (evidence-consistent), E-Conflict (evidence-conflicting), and E-Gap (evidence-insufficient). We further propose ECRT (Evidence-Conditioned Risk Triage), a two-stage white-box detection framework: Stage 1 performs Safe/Unsafe risk triage, and Stage 2 refines unsafe cases into contradiction-driven versus evidence-gap risks. ECRT leverages internal representation and logit shifts under CTX/NOCTX conditions, with class-balanced training for robust learning. Under evidence-grouped (not patient-disjoint) splits across multiple backbones, ECRT provides strong Stage-1 risk triage and explicit subtype attribution, improves Stage-1 balanced accuracy by +0.15 to +0.19 over external uncertainty and self-consistency baselines and by +0.02 to +0.07 over the strongest adapted supervised baseline, and consistently exceeds a single-stage white-box ablation on Stage-1 balanced accuracy. These findings support white-box internal signals grounded in retinal evidence as a practical route to interpretable medical LLM risk triage.

AI.tldr: 提出了RETINA-SAFE基准和ECRT框架，用于检测医学大模型在糖尿病视网膜病变诊断中的幻觉问题，通过证据对齐、冲突和缺口三种任务评估模型的风险 triage 能力。
AI.motivation: 医学大模型在证据不足或冲突时容易产生幻觉，存在安全隐患。现有方法难以有效识别和分类这些风险。
AI.method: 提出两阶段白盒检测框架ECRT：第一阶段进行安全/非安全风险分类，第二阶段将不安全案例细分为矛盾驱动型和证据缺口型。利用CTX/NOCTX条件下的内部表征和logit变化，配合类别平衡训练实现鲁棒学习。
AI.result: ECRT在Stage-1风险分类上相比外部不确定性和自一致性基线提升0.15-0.19平衡准确率，比最强监督基线提升0.02-0.07，显著优于单阶段白盒消融实验。
AI.conclusion: 基于视网膜证据的白盒内部信号是实现可解释医学大模型风险分类的可行路径。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. This paper is about medical LLM hallucination detection for diabetic retinopathy diagnosis, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. No relevance to 2D-to-3D motion reconstruction, video generation, visual feature extraction for motion, or any computer graphics methods.

title: Rethinking IRSTD: Single-Point Supervision Guided Encoder-only Framework is Enough for Infrared Small Target Detection
summary: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) aims to separate small targets from clutter backgrounds. Extensive research is dedicated to the pixel-level supervision-guided "encoder-decoder" segmentation paradigm. Although having achieved promising performance, they neglect the fact that small targets only occupy a few pixels and are usually accompanied with blurred boundary caused by clutter backgrounds. Based on this observation, we argue that the first principle of IRSTD should be target localization instead of separating all target region accompanied with indistinguishable background noise. In this paper, we reformulate IRSTD as a centroid regression task and propose a novel Single-Point Supervision guided Infrared Probabilistic Response Encoding method (namely, SPIRE), which is indeed challenging due to the mismatch between reduced supervision network and equivalent output. Specifically, we first design a Point-Response Prior Supervision (PRPS), which transforms single-point annotations into probabilistic response map consistent with infrared point-target response characteristics, with a High-Resolution Probabilistic Encoder (HRPE) that enables encoder-only, end-to-end regression without decoder reconstruction. By preserving high-resolution features and increasing effective supervision density, SPIRE alleviates optimization instability under sparse target distributions. Finally, extensive experiments on various IRSTD benchmarks, including SIRST-UAVB and SIRST4 demonstrate that SPIRE achieves competitive target-level detection performance with consistently low false alarm rate (Fa) and significantly reduced computational cost. Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/NIRIXIANG/SPIRE-IRSTD.

AI.tldr: 本文将红外小目标检测(IRSTD)重新定义为质心回归任务，提出基于单点监督的红外概率响应编码方法(SPIRE)，通过点响应先验监督(PRPS)将单点标注转换为概率响应图，并设计高分辨率概率编码器(HRPE)实现端到端回归，在SIRST-UAVB和SIRST4数据集上实现了具有低误报率的竞争性检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用像素级监督的编码器-解码器分割范式，但忽略了两个关键问题：1)小目标仅占很少像素；2)目标边界因杂波背景而模糊。作者认为IRSTD的首要原则应是目标定位，而非分离所有目标区域伴随的不可区分背景噪声。
AI.method: 1.点响应先验监督(PRPS)：将单点标注转换为符合红外点目标响应特征的概率响应图；2.高分辨率概率编码器(HRPE)：保留高分辨率特征，增加有效监督密度，实现仅编码器的端到端回归，无需解码器重建。
AI.result: 在SIRST-UAVB和SIRST4等多个IRSTD基准数据集上，SPIRE实现了具有竞争力的目标级检测性能，具有一致的低误报率(Fa)，并显著降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 通过将IRSTD重新定义为质心回归任务并采用单点监督，SPIRE有效解决了小目标检测中监督信息不足和优化不稳定的问题，在保持低误报率的同时大幅降低了计算开销。

relevance_reason: The paper is about Infrared Small Target Detection (IRSTD) - a computer vision task for detecting small objects in infrared images for surveillance/remote sensing. This is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. The application domains are entirely different: the paper deals with infrared target detection while the profile deals with human motion generation from video. Even though both involve visual processing, they address fundamentally different problems with different goals (object detection vs human motion generation).

title: ETR: Entropy Trend Reward for Efficient Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning improves large language model performance on complex tasks, but often produces excessively long and inefficient reasoning traces. Existing methods shorten CoTs using length penalties or global entropy reduction, implicitly assuming that low uncertainty is desirable throughout reasoning. We show instead that reasoning efficiency is governed by the trajectory of uncertainty. CoTs with dominant downward entropy trends are substantially shorter. Motivated by this insight, we propose Entropy Trend Reward (ETR), a trajectory-aware objective that encourages progressive uncertainty reduction while allowing limited local exploration. We integrate ETR into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and evaluate it across multiple reasoning models and challenging benchmarks. ETR consistently achieves a superior accuracy-efficiency tradeoff, improving DeepSeek-R1-Distill-7B by 9.9% in accuracy while reducing CoT length by 67% across four benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/Xuan1030/ETR

AI.tldr: 本文提出熵趋势奖励(ETR)方法,通过鼓励推理过程中不确定性逐步降低同时允许有限的局部探索,来解决思维链(CoT)推理过长的问题。该方法整合到GRPO中,在多个推理模型和基准测试上实现了优越的精度-效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前CoT推理方法通常产生过长且低效的推理痕迹。现有方法使用长度惩罚或全局熵减来缩短CoT,隐含假设推理过程中低不确定性是 desirable的。作者发现推理效率实际上由不确定性的轨迹决定,具有主导向下熵趋势的CoT要短得多。
AI.method: 提出熵趋势奖励(Entropy Trend Reward, ETR)——一种轨迹感知的目标函数,鼓励渐进式不确定性降低,同时允许有限的局部探索。将ETR集成到Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)中。
AI.result: ETR在多个推理模型和挑战性基准测试上 consistently 实现了优越的精度-效率权衡,将DeepSeek-R1-Distill-7B的准确率提高9.9%的同时,在四个基准测试上将CoT长度减少67%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了推理效率受不确定性轨迹governed,而非全局不确定性水平。ETR作为一种新的训练目标,成功实现了高效推理,在保持甚至提升准确率的同时显著缩短了推理长度。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM reasoning optimization (Chain-of-Thought reasoning, GRPO, entropy-based rewards for language models), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are fundamentally different: NLP/LLM training vs 3D motion generation from 2D video. There is no overlap in methods or application context.

title: 3DTurboQuant: Training-Free Near-Optimal Quantization for 3D Reconstruction Models
summary: Every existing method for compressing 3D Gaussian Splatting, NeRF, or transformer-based 3D reconstructors requires learning a data-dependent codebook through per-scene fine-tuning. We show this is unnecessary. The parameter vectors that dominate storage in these models, 45-dimensional spherical harmonics in 3DGS and 1024-dimensional key-value vectors in DUSt3R, fall in a dimension range where a single random rotation transforms any input into coordinates with a known Beta distribution. This makes precomputed, data-independent Lloyd-Max quantization near-optimal, within a factor of 2.7 of the information-theoretic lower bound. We develop 3D, deriving (1) a dimension-dependent criterion that predicts which parameters can be quantized and at what bit-width before running any experiment, (2) norm-separation bounds connecting quantization MSE to rendering PSNR per scene, (3) an entry-grouping strategy extending rotation-based quantization to 2-dimensional hash grid features, and (4) a composable pruning-quantization pipeline with a closed-form compression ratio. On NeRF Synthetic, 3DTurboQuant compresses 3DGS by 3.5x with 0.02dB PSNR loss and DUSt3R KV caches by 7.9x with 39.7dB pointmap fidelity. No training, no codebook learning, no calibration data. Compression takes seconds. The code will be released (https://github.com/JaeLee18/3DTurboQuant)

AI.tldr: 作者提出3DTurboQuant，无需训练和码本学习即可对3DGS和DUSt3R进行高效压缩，利用参数向量的维度特性实现数据无关的Lloyd-Max量化，在NeRF Synthetic上分别实现3.5倍和7.9倍的压缩比。
AI.motivation: 现有所有压缩3D Gaussian Splatting、NeRF或基于Transformer的3D重建器的方法都需要通过逐场景微调来学习数据依赖的码本，作者证明这种做法是不必要的。
AI.method: 利用参数向量的维度特性（45维球面谐波和1024维键值向量），通过单一随机旋转将输入转换为已知Beta分布的坐标，实现数据无关的Lloyd-Max量化。并推导出维度相关准则、范数分离边界、针对2D哈希网格特征的分组策略，以及可组合的剪枝-量化流水线。
AI.result: 在NeRF Synthetic数据集上，3DTurboQuant将3DGS压缩3.5倍，PSNR仅损失0.02dB；将DUSt3R的KV缓存压缩7.9倍，点图保真度达39.7dB。压缩过程无需训练、无需码本学习、无需校准数据，耗时仅数秒。
AI.conclusion: 3DTurboQuant能够在无需训练、无需码本学习、无需校准数据的情况下，实现高效且接近信息论下限的3D模型压缩。在NeRF Synthetic上，3DGS压缩3.5倍仅损失0.02dB PSNR，DUSt3R KV缓存压缩7.9倍达到39.7dB点图保真度，压缩时间仅需数秒。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on 3D scene reconstruction (3D Gaussian Splatting, DUSt3R for NeRF/point cloud scene representation), which is a completely different application domain from 3D human motion generation. While both deal with "3D", scene reconstruction (reconstructing environments/buildings/objects) is fundamentally different from human motion generation (recovering/generating human body movements from video). The paper addresses model compression/quantization - not the 2D-to-3D motion conversion, temporal consistency, or domain gap issues specific to human motion. Pain points in the profile are about video-to-motion, not scene-to-3D-representation.

title: LatentAudit: Real-Time White-Box Faithfulness Monitoring for Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Verifiable Deployment
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) mitigates hallucination but does not eliminate it: a deployed system must still decide, at inference time, whether its answer is actually supported by the retrieved evidence. We introduce LatentAudit, a white-box auditor that pools mid-to-late residual-stream activations from an open-weight generator and measures their Mahalanobis distance to the evidence representation. The resulting quadratic rule requires no auxiliary judge model, runs at generation time, and is simple enough to calibrate on a small held-out set. We show that residual-stream geometry carries a usable faithfulness signal, that this signal survives architecture changes and realistic retrieval failures, and that the same rule remains amenable to public verification. On PubMedQA with Llama-3-8B, LatentAudit reaches 0.942 AUROC with 0.77,ms overhead. Across three QA benchmarks and five model families (Llama-2/3, Qwen-2.5/3, Mistral), the monitor remains stable; under a four-way stress test with contradictions, retrieval misses, and partial-support noise, it reaches 0.9566--0.9815 AUROC on PubMedQA and 0.9142--0.9315 on HotpotQA. At 16-bit fixed-point precision, the audit rule preserves 99.8% of the FP16 AUROC, enabling Groth16-based public verification without revealing model weights or activations. Together, these results position residual-stream geometry as a practical basis for real-time RAG faithfulness monitoring and optional verifiable deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LatentAudit，一种基于残差流几何的白盒审计方法，用于检测RAG系统中生成答案是否被检索到的证据支持。
AI.motivation: RAG系统虽然可以减轻幻觉，但无法完全消除幻觉，因此在推理时需要判断答案是否被检索到的证据真正支持，这是一个实时的、可验证的faithfulness监控问题。
AI.method: LatentAudit从开源生成器中提取中后期残差流激活，测量它们到证据表示的Mahalanobis距离，形成一个二次规则，无需辅助评判模型，可在生成时运行，并在小规模保留集上进行校准。
AI.result: 在PubMedQA上使用Llama-3-8B达到0.942 AUROC，额外开销仅0.77ms。跨三个QA基准和五个模型家族（Llama-2/3、Qwen-2.5/3、Mistral）保持稳定。在四向压力测试（矛盾、检索失败、部分支持噪声）下，PubMedQA达到0.9566-0.9815 AUROC，HotpotQA达到0.9142-0.9315 AUROC。在16位定点精度下保留99.8%的FP16 AUROC，支持Groth16公开验证。
AI.conclusion: 残差流几何可作为实时RAGfaithfulness监控的实用基础，支持可选的可验证部署。

relevance_reason: This paper is about RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems for detecting hallucinations in LLM text generation (QA tasks like PubMedQA, HotpotQA). It has NO connection to Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. The methods (residual flow activation analysis, Mahalanobis distance for faithfulness monitoring) are entirely in the NLP/ML domain for text QA. title: UAVReason: A Unified, Large-Scale Benchmark for Multimodal Aerial Scene Reasoning and Generation
summary: Vision-Language models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capability in ground-view visual understanding but often fracture when deployed on high-altitude Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). The failure largely stems from a pronounced domain shift, characterized by tiny and densely packed objects, repetitive textures, and ambiguous top-down orientations. These factors severely disrupt semantic grounding and hinder both spatial reasoning and controllable generation. To bridge this critical gap, we introduce UAVReason, the first unified large-scale multi-modal benchmark dedicated to nadir-view UAV scenarios, derived from a high-fidelity UAV simulation platform. In contrast to existing UAV benchmarks, which are largely siloed and focus on single tasks like object detection or segmentation, UAVReason uniquely consolidates over 273K Visual Question Answering (VQA) pairs, including 23.6K single frames with detailed captions, 68.2K 2-frame temporal sequences, and 188.8K cross-modal generation samples. The benchmark probes 22 diverse reasoning types across spatial and temporal axes while simultaneously evaluating high-fidelity generation across RGB, depth, and segmentation modalities. We further establish a strong, unified baseline model via multi-task learning. Extensive experiments validate the efficacy of our unified approach across diverse metrics, such as EM/F1 for VQA, mIoU for segmentation, and CLIP Score for generation. These results indicate limitations of general-domain vision-language models and show that unified multi-task learning substantially improves UAV-native performance. All data, code, and evaluation tools will be publicly released to advance UAV multimodal research.

AI.tldr: UAVReason是首个针对无人机俯视场景的大规模多模态基准，包含273K VQA问答对和22种推理类型，通过统一多任务学习基线模型验证了方法有效性，为无人机视觉语言研究提供数据支持。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在地面视觉理解方面表现优异，但在无人机（UAV）高空俯视场景中性能显著下降。主要原因在于显著的领域偏移问题：目标小且密集、纹理重复、俯视方向模糊，这些因素严重破坏了语义定位，阻碍了空间推理和可控生成能力。
AI.method: 提出了UAVReason，这是首个针对俯视无人机场景的统一大规模多模态基准。该基准来自高保真无人机仿真平台，包含273K VQA问答对（23.6K单帧详细描述、68.2K两帧时序序列、188.8K跨模态生成样本），探测22种空间和时序推理类型，同时评估RGB、深度和分割模态的高保真生成。通过多任务学习建立了统一的基线模型。
AI.result: 实验验证了统一多任务学习方法的有效性，在VQA的EM/F1指标、分割的mIoU指标、生成的CLIP Score上均优于通用领域视觉语言模型，显著提升了无人机原生性能。
AI.conclusion: UAVReason基准填补了无人机多模态研究的空白，统一了VQA和跨模态生成任务，证明了多任务学习可以有效缓解领域偏移问题，为无人机视觉语言研究提供了重要的数据集和基线模型。

title: TFRBench: A Reasoning Benchmark for Evaluating Forecasting Systems
summary: We introduce TFRBench, the first benchmark designed to evaluate the reasoning capabilities of forecasting systems. Traditionally, time-series forecasting has been evaluated solely on numerical accuracy, treating foundation models as ``black boxes.'' Unlike existing benchmarks, TFRBench provides a protocol for evaluating the reasoning generated by forecasting systems--specifically their analysis of cross-channel dependencies, trends, and external events. To enable this, we propose a systematic multi-agent framework that utilizes an iterative verification loop to synthesize numerically grounded reasoning traces. Spanning ten datasets across five domains, our evaluation confirms that this reasoning is causally effective; useful for evaluation; and prompting LLMs with our generated traces significantly improves forecasting accuracy compared to direct numerical prediction (e.g., avg. $\sim40.2\%\to56.6\%)$, validating the quality of our reasoning. Conversely, benchmarking experiments reveal that off-the-shelf LLMs consistently struggle with both reasoning (lower LLM-as-a-Judge scores) and numerical forecasting, frequently failing to capture domain-specific dynamics. TFRBench thus establishes a new standard for interpretable, reasoning-based evaluation in time-series forecasting. Our benchmark is available at: https://tfrbench.github.io

AI.tldr: TFRBench是首个用于评估预测系统推理能力的基准测试。与传统仅评估数值准确性的方法不同，它提供了评估预测系统 reasoning 能力的协议，包括跨通道依赖性、趋势和外部事件的分析。
AI.motivation: 传统时间序列预测仅通过数值准确性来评估，将基础模型视为"黑箱"，缺乏对模型推理过程的解释性评估。
AI.method: 提出了一种系统的多智能体框架，利用迭代验证循环来合成数值基础的推理轨迹。
AI.result: 在10个数据集、5个领域的评估中，使用生成的推理轨迹提示LLM可将预测准确率从约40.2%显著提升至56.6%；而现成LLM在推理和数值预测方面均表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: TFRBench为时间序列预测建立了基于解释性推理评估的新标准。

title: LLM-as-Judge for Semantic Judging of Powerline Segmentation in UAV Inspection
summary: The deployment of lightweight segmentation models on drones for autonomous power line inspection presents a critical challenge: maintaining reliable performance under real-world conditions that differ from training data. Although compact architectures such as U-Net enable real-time onboard inference, their segmentation outputs can degrade unpredictably in adverse environments, raising safety concerns. In this work, we study the feasibility of using a large language model (LLM) as a semantic judge to assess the reliability of power line segmentation results produced by drone-mounted models. Rather than introducing a new inspection system, we formalize a watchdog scenario in which an offboard LLM evaluates segmentation overlays and examine whether such a judge can be trusted to behave consistently and perceptually coherently. To this end, we design two evaluation protocols that analyze the judge's repeatability and sensitivity. First, we assess repeatability by repeatedly querying the LLM with identical inputs and fixed prompts, measuring the stability of its quality scores and confidence estimates. Second, we evaluate perceptual sensitivity by introducing controlled visual corruptions (fog, rain, snow, shadow, and sunflare) and analyzing how the judge's outputs respond to progressive degradation in segmentation quality. Our results show that the LLM produces highly consistent categorical judgments under identical conditions while exhibiting appropriate declines in confidence as visual reliability deteriorates. Moreover, the judge remains responsive to perceptual cues such as missing or misidentified power lines, even under challenging conditions. These findings suggest that, when carefully constrained, an LLM can serve as a reliable semantic judge for monitoring segmentation quality in safety-critical aerial inspection tasks.

AI.tldr: 研究使用大型语言模型(LLM)作为语义评判器，评估无人机搭载模型在电力线巡检中的分割结果可靠性。
AI.motivation: 无人机部署的轻量级分割模型在真实环境（特别是恶劣天气条件）下性能会不可预测地下降，带来安全隐患，需要一种可靠的方法来评估分割质量。
AI.method: 设计了两个评估协议：1）重复性评估：使用相同输入和固定提示重复查询LLM，测量其质量评分和置信度估计的稳定性；2）感知敏感性评估：引入受控的视觉退化（雾、雨、雪、阴影、太阳眩光），分析LLM输出对分割质量逐步下降的响应。
AI.result: LLM在相同条件下产生高度一致的分类型判断，且随着视觉可靠性下降表现出适当的置信度下降。此外，评判器仍能响应缺失或误识别的电力线等感知线索。
AI.conclusion: 在精心约束下，LLM可以作为安全关键的航空巡检任务中监控分割质量的可靠语义评判器。

The application domains are entirely different: one deals with human motion in graphics, the other deals with infrastructure inspection in computer vision. No overlap in field, application, or practical use case.

title: Beyond Semantic Search: Towards Referential Anchoring in Composed Image Retrieval
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Project page, dataset, and code are available at: https://hahajun1101.github.io/OACIR/
summary: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) has demonstrated significant potential by enabling flexible multimodal queries that combine a reference image and modification text. However, CIR inherently prioritizes semantic matching, struggling to reliably retrieve a user-specified instance across contexts. In practice, emphasizing concrete instance fidelity over broad semantics is often more consequential. In this work, we propose Object-Anchored Composed Image Retrieval (OACIR), a novel fine-grained retrieval task that mandates strict instance-level consistency. To advance research on this task, we construct OACIRR (OACIR on Real-world images), the first large-scale, multi-domain benchmark comprising over 160K quadruples and four challenging candidate galleries enriched with hard-negative instance distractors. Each quadruple augments the compositional query with a bounding box that visually anchors the object in the reference image, providing a precise and flexible way to ensure instance preservation. To address the OACIR task, we propose AdaFocal, a framework featuring a Context-Aware Attention Modulator that adaptively intensifies attention within the specified instance region, dynamically balancing focus between the anchored instance and the broader compositional context. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AdaFocal substantially outperforms existing compositional retrieval models, particularly in maintaining instance-level fidelity, thereby establishing a robust baseline for this challenging task while opening new directions for more flexible, instance-aware retrieval systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出目标锚定组合图像检索(OACIR)，一种新的细粒度检索任务，要求严格的实例级一致性。通过在组合查询中添加参考图像的边界框来视觉锚定目标，确保实例保留。为推进该任务研究，构建了OACIRR基准，包含160K四元组和四个包含困难负样本的候选库。提出AdaFocal框架，采用上下文感知注意力调制器，自适应强化指定实例区域的注意力。
AI.motivation: 现有组合图像检索(CIR)优先考虑语义匹配，难以可靠地在不同上下文中检索用户指定的实例。在实际应用中，强调具体的实例保真度往往比广泛语义更重要。
AI.method: 提出OACIR任务，通过边界框视觉锚定参考图像中的对象；构建OACIRR大规模多领域基准（160K四元组+4个含硬负样本的候选库）；提出AdaFocal框架，包含上下文感知注意力调制器，自适应强化锚定实例区域的注意力，动态平衡实例与更广泛组合上下文之间的关注度。
AI.result: AdaFocal显著优于现有组合检索模型，特别是在保持实例级保真度方面。
AI.conclusion: 为这一具有挑战性的任务建立了坚实的基线，开辟了更灵活的实例感知检索系统的新方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) - a computer vision task for retrieving images using reference images with boundary boxes. The application domain is completely different from the research profile's 3D Human Motion Generation. While both fields may use visual feature extraction, the target applications are entirely distinct: image retrieval vs. 2D video-to-3D human motion reconstruction. This paper does not address any of the specified pain points (domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, 3D pose recovery, temporal consistency in 2D-to-3D conversion).

title: Towards Effective In-context Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer via Domain-invariant-neurons-based Retrieval
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have made notable progress in logical reasoning, yet still fall short of human-level performance. Current boosting strategies rely on expert-crafted in-domain demonstrations, limiting their applicability in expertise-scarce domains, such as specialized mathematical reasoning, formal logic, or legal analysis. In this work, we demonstrate the feasibility of leveraging cross-domain demonstrating examples to boost the LLMs' reasoning performance. Despite substantial domain differences, many reusable implicit logical structures are shared across domains. In order to effectively retrieve cross-domain examples for unseen domains under investigation, in this work, we further propose an effective retrieval method, called domain-invariant neurons-based retrieval (\textbf{DIN-Retrieval}). Concisely, DIN-Retrieval first summarizes a hidden representation that is universal across different domains. Then, during the inference stage, we use the DIN vector to retrieve structurally compatible cross-domain demonstrations for the in-context learning. Experimental results in multiple settings for the transfer of mathematical and logical reasoning demonstrate that our method achieves an average improvement of 1.8 over the state-of-the-art methods \footnote{Our implementation is available at https://github.com/Leon221220/DIN-Retrieval}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DIN-Retrieval方法，利用跨域示例和域不变神经元来提升LLM在专业领域（如数学推理、形式逻辑）的逻辑推理性能，解决专家稀缺领域演示示例获取困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM推理提升依赖领域内专家演示，但在专业数学推理、形式逻辑、法律分析等专家稀缺的领域应用受限。需要探索跨域示例来提升LLM推理能力。
AI.method: 提出DIN-Retrieval方法：1)总结跨域通用的隐藏表示；2)使用DIN向量在推理阶段检索结构兼容的跨域演示样本用于上下文学习。
AI.result: 在数学和逻辑推理的多个迁移设置中，平均提升1.8超越最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DIN-Retrieval通过域不变神经元实现跨域示例检索，在数学和逻辑推理任务上平均提升1.8，证明了跨域示例可有效提升LLM推理性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM cross-domain knowledge transfer for mathematical/logical reasoning tasks (NLP domain), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. It deals with retrieving cross-domain examples to improve LLM reasoning, not video generation, motion reconstruction, or any visual/graphics tasks. The application domain is entirely different - NLP vs 3D motion generation from 2D video.

title: LSGS-Loc: Towards Robust 3DGS-Based Visual Localization for Large-Scale UAV Scenarios
comment: This paper is under reviewed by RA-L. The copyright might be transferred upon acceptance
summary: Visual localization in large-scale UAV scenarios is a critical capability for autonomous systems, yet it remains challenging due to geometric complexity and environmental variations. While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a promising scene representation, existing 3DGS-based visual localization methods struggle with robust pose initialization and sensitivity to rendering artifacts in large-scale settings. To address these limitations, we propose LSGS-Loc, a novel visual localization pipeline tailored for large-scale 3DGS scenes. Specifically, we introduce a scale-aware pose initialization strategy that combines scene-agnostic relative pose estimation with explicit 3DGS scale constraints, enabling geometrically grounded localization without scene-specific training. Furthermore, in the pose refinement, to mitigate the impact of reconstruction artifacts such as blur and floaters, we develop a Laplacian-based reliability masking mechanism that guides photometric refinement toward high-quality regions. Extensive experiments on large-scale UAV benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy and robustness for unordered image queries, significantly outperforming existing 3DGS-based approaches. Code is available at: https://github.com/xzhang-z/LSGS-Loc

AI.tldr: 提出了LSGS-Loc，一种针对大规模3DGS场景的新型视觉定位 pipeline，通过尺度感知的 pose 初始化和拉普拉斯可靠性掩码机制来解决大规模无人机场景中的视觉定位问题。
AI.motivation: 大规模无人机场景中的视觉定位面临几何复杂性和环境变化的挑战，现有的3DGS-based 定位方法在鲁棒的 pose 初始化和对大规模场景中渲染伪影（如模糊、浮动物）的敏感性方面存在局限。
AI.method: 1. 尺度感知 pose 初始化策略：结合场景无关的相对 pose 估计与显式3DGS尺度约束，实现无需场景特定训练的几何接地定位。2. _pose 优化_：开发了基于拉普拉斯的可靠性掩码机制，引导光度优化聚焦于高质量区域，以减轻重建伪影的影响。
AI.result: 在大型无人机基准数据集上实现了最先进的精度和鲁棒性，显著优于现有的3DGS方法。
AI.conclusion: LSGS-Loc能有效解决大规模3DGS场景中的视觉定位问题，通过尺度感知初始化和可靠性掩码机制提升了定位的准确性和鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3DGS-based visual localization for UAV (drone) scenarios, which is completely outside the domain of 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - drone localization vs human motion generation from video. While both involve 3D reconstruction, the methods (3DGS localization vs diffusion-based motion generation) and end goals are unrelated. The pain points (UAV pose estimation vs 2D-to-3D motion conversion) are also completely different. This paper would be relevant for UAV navigation research, not human motion generation.

title: Neural Assistive Impulses: Synthesizing Exaggerated Motions for Physics-based Characters
summary: Physics-based character animation has become a fundamental approach for synthesizing realistic, physically plausible motions. While current data-driven deep reinforcement learning (DRL) methods can synthesize complex skills, they struggle to reproduce exaggerated, stylized motions, such as instantaneous dashes or mid-air trajectory changes, which are required in animation but violate standard physical laws. The primary limitation stems from modeling the character as an underactuated floating-base system, in which internal joint torques and momentum conservation strictly govern motion. Direct attempts to enforce such motions via external wrenches often lead to training instability, as velocity discontinuities produce sparse, high-magnitude force spikes that prevent policy convergence. We propose Assistive Impulse Neural Control, a framework that reformulates external assistance in impulse space rather than force space to ensure numerical stability. We decompose the assistive signal into an analytic high-frequency component derived from Inverse Dynamics and a learned low-frequency residual correction, governed by a hybrid neural policy. We demonstrate that our method enables robust tracking of highly agile, dynamically infeasible maneuvers that were previously intractable for physics-based methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Assistive Impulse Neural Control框架，将外部辅助从力空间转换到冲量空间，解决了物理-based角色动画中无法重现夸张、风格化动作的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前数据驱动的深度强化学习方法在合成复杂技能方面表现良好，但在重现夸张、风格化动作（如瞬间冲刺或空中轨迹改变）方面存在困难。这些动作违反标准物理定律，而将角色建模为欠驱动浮基系统，内部关节力矩和动量守恒严格约束运动，直接施加外部力会导致训练不稳定，产生稀疏的高 magnitude 力尖峰，阻碍策略收敛。
AI.method: 提出Assistive Impulse Neural Control框架，将外部辅助从力空间重新表述为冲量空间以确保数值稳定性。将辅助信号分解为：1) 来自逆动力学的高频解析分量；2) 由混合神经策略控制的低频残差校正学习部分。
AI.result: 该方法能够鲁棒跟踪高度敏捷、动态不可行的机动动作，这些动作在之前对于物理-based方法来说是无法实现的。
AI.conclusion: 通过在冲量空间而非力空间中处理外部辅助，本文成功解决了物理-based角色动画中风格化动作合成的核心问题，为动画中夸张动作的物理仿真开辟了新途径。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on physics-based character animation using reinforcement learning, not 3D human motion generation. The application domain is completely different - it's about controlling physics-based characters (robots/non-human) using impulse-based control, not about extracting 3D human motion from 2D video or generating human motion. The methods (RL, neural control, impulse space) have no overlap with the research profile's methods (diffusion-based video generation, VLMs, 2D-to-3D motion reconstruction). While both deal with motion, this is physics-based character control, not human motion generation from visual inputs.

title: Weather-Conditioned Branch Routing for Robust LiDAR-Radar 3D Object Detection
summary: Robust 3D object detection in adverse weather is highly challenging due to the varying reliability of different sensors. While existing LiDAR-4D radar fusion methods improve robustness, they predominantly rely on fixed or weakly adaptive pipelines, failing to dy-namically adjust modality preferences as environmental conditions change. To bridge this gap, we reformulate multi-modal perception as a weather-conditioned branch routing problem. Instead of computing a single fused output, our framework explicitly maintains three parallel 3D feature streams: a pure LiDAR branch, a pure 4D radar branch, and a condition-gated fusion branch. Guided by a condition token extracted from visual and semantic prompts, a lightweight router dynamically predicts sample-specific weights to softly aggregate these representations. Furthermore, to prevent branch collapse, we introduce a weather-supervised learning strategy with auxiliary classification and diversity regularization to enforce distinct, condition-dependent routing behaviors. Extensive experiments on the K-Radar benchmark demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. Furthermore, it provides explicit and highly interpretable insights into modality preferences, transparently revealing how adaptive routing robustly shifts reliance between LiDAR and 4D radar across diverse adverse-weather scenarios. The source code with be released.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于恶劣天气下3D目标检测的天气条件分支路由框架，通过动态调整LiDAR和4D雷达的融合权重来提高感知系统的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR-4D雷达融合方法主要依赖固定或弱自适应管道，无法根据环境条件变化动态调整模态偏好。
AI.method: 提出了一种天气条件分支路由框架，包含三个并行3D特征流（纯LiDAR分支、纯4D雷达分支、条件门控融合分支），由轻量级路由器根据条件token动态预测样本特定权重进行软聚合。引入天气监督学习策略，包含辅助分类和多样性正则化以防止分支崩溃。
AI.result: 在K-Radar基准测试中取得最先进性能，提供了清晰的模态偏好可解释性，展示自适应路由如何在不同恶劣天气下稳健地转移LiDAR和4D雷达之间的依赖。
AI.conclusion: 在K-Radar基准测试上实现了最先进的性能，并提供了可解释的模态偏好洞察，揭示了自适应路由如何在不同恶劣天气场景中动态调整LiDAR和4D雷达的依赖程度。

The methods and goals are unrelated - one deals with autonomous vehicle perception in adverse weather, the other deals with converting 2D video to 3D human motion. No relevance to the pain points of domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, or 2D-to-3D motion reconstruction.

title: Reason Analogically via Cross-domain Prior Knowledge: An Empirical Study of Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer for In-Context Learning
summary: Despite its success, existing in-context learning (ICL) relies on in-domain expert demonstrations, limiting its applicability when expert annotations are scarce. We posit that different domains may share underlying reasoning structures, enabling source-domain demonstrations to improve target-domain inference despite semantic mismatch. To test this hypothesis, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study of different retrieval methods to validate the feasibility of achieving cross-domain knowledge transfer under the in-context learning setting. Our results demonstrate conditional positive transfer in cross-domain ICL. We identify a clear example absorption threshold: beyond it, positive transfer becomes more likely, and additional demonstrations yield larger gains. Further analysis suggests that these gains stem from reasoning structure repair by retrieved cross-domain examples, rather than semantic cues. Overall, our study validates the feasibility of leveraging cross-domain knowledge transfer to improve cross-domain ICL performance, motivating the community to explore designing more effective retrieval approaches for this novel direction.\footnote{Our implementation is available at https://github.com/littlelaska/ICL-TF4LR}

AI.tldr: 本文研究跨域情境学习(ICL)中，是否可以利用源域的演示样本来辅助目标域的推理任务。研究通过综合实证实验验证了跨域知识转移的可行性，并发现存在"示例吸收阈值"，超过该阈值后正向转移更容易发生。
AI.motivation: 现有情境学习依赖于领域内的专家演示，当专家标注稀缺时其适用性受限。本文假设不同领域可能共享底层推理结构，使得源域演示能够在语义不匹配的情况下改善目标域推理。
AI.method: 对不同检索方法进行综合实证研究，验证跨域情境学习设置下的跨域知识转移可行性。
AI.result: 研究证实了跨域ICL中存在条件性正向转移。发现了明确的示例吸收阈值：超过该阈值后，正向转移更可能发生，且额外演示能带来更大收益。进一步分析表明这些收益源于跨域示例对推理结构的修复，而非语义线索。
AI.conclusion: 验证了利用跨域知识转移改善跨域ICL性能的可行性，为社区探索设计更有效的跨域检索方法提供了参考方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Cross-domain In-Context Learning (ICL) in NLP/ML - a fundamental methodology paper about knowledge transfer between domains. It has NO connection to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different: it's about text-based reasoning tasks, not about video generation, 2D-to-3D motion reconstruction, diffusion models for motion, or any computer graphics application. None of the methods (diffusion video generation, VLM for quality assessment, 3D motion models, 2D-to-3D reconstruction) are used.

title: CRISP: Rank-Guided Iterative Squeezing for Robust Medical Image Segmentation under Domain Shift
summary: Distribution shift in medical imaging remains a central bottleneck for the clinical translation of medical AI. Failure to address it can lead to severe performance degradation in unseen environments and exacerbate health inequities. Existing methods for domain adaptation are inherently limited by exhausting predefined possibilities through simulated shifts or pseudo-supervision. Such strategies struggle in the open-ended and unpredictable real world, where distribution shifts are effectively infinite. To address this challenge, we introduce an empirical law called ``Rank Stability of Positive Regions'', which states that the relative rank of predicted probabilities for positive voxels remains stable under distribution shift. Guided by this principle, we propose CRISP, a parameter-free and model-agnostic framework requiring no target-domain information. CRISP is the first framework to make segmentation based on rank rather than probabilities. CRISP simulates model behavior under distribution shift via latent feature perturbation, where voxel probability rankings exhibit two stable patterns: regions that consistently retain high probabilities (destined positives according to the principle) and those that remain low-probability (can be safely classified as negatives). Based on these patterns, we construct high-precision (HP) and high-recall (HR) priors and recursively refine them under perturbation. We then design an iterative training framework, making HP and HR progressively ``squeeze'' to the final segmentation. Extensive evaluations on multi-center cardiac MRI and CT-based lung vessel segmentation demonstrate CRISP's superior robustness, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods with striking HD95 reductions of up to 0.14 (7.0\% improvement), 1.90 (13.1\% improvement), and 8.39 (38.9\% improvement) pixels across multi-center, demographic, and modality shifts, respectively.

AI.tldr: 针对医学影像分布转移问题，提出基于秩稳定性的CRISP框架，无需目标域信息即可实现鲁棒分割，在多中心心脏MRI和CT肺血管分割上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 医学影像中的分布转移是临床翻译的主要瓶颈，现有领域自适应方法受限于预定义转移或伪监督，无法处理开放且不可预测的真实世界转移。
AI.method: 提出CRISP框架，基于"正区域秩稳定性"经验定律，通过潜在特征扰动模拟分布转移，构建高精度的HP和高召回的HR先验，在扰动下递归细化这些先验，设计迭代训练框架使HP和HR逐步"挤压"得到最终分割。
AI.result: 在多中心心脏MRI和CT肺血管分割任务上验证，CRISP显著优于最先进方法，在多中心转移、人口统计转移和模态转移场景下，HD95分别降低0.14（7.0%改善）、1.90（13.1%改善）和8.39（38.9%改善）。
AI.conclusion: CRISP通过基于秩的分割范式转变，在多中心心脏MRI和CT肺血管分割任务上显著优于现有方法，在多中心、人口统计和模态转移场景下分别实现了7.0%、13.1%和38.9%的HD95改善，证明了秩稳定性的有效性和普适性。

Even though the research profile deals with domain shift and uses diffusion methods, this paper addresses domain shift in medical imaging context. title: Learning to Synergize Semantic and Geometric Priors for Limited-Data Wheat Disease Segmentation
summary: Wheat disease segmentation is fundamental to precision agriculture but faces severe challenges from significant intra-class temporal variations across growth stages. Such substantial appearance shifts make collecting a representative dataset for training from scratch both labor-intensive and impractical. To address this, we propose SGPer, a Semantic-Geometric Prior Synergization framework that treats wheat disease segmentation under limited data as a coupled task of disease-specific semantic perception and disease boundary localization. Our core insight is that pretrained DINOv2 provides robust category-aware semantic priors to handle appearance shifts, which can be converted into coarse spatial prompts to guide SAM for the precise localization of disease boundaries. Specifically, SGPer designs disease-sensitive adapters with multiple disease-friendly filters and inserts them into both DINOv2 and SAM to align their pretrained representations with disease-specific characteristics. To operationalize this synergy, SGPer transforms DINOv2-derived features into dense, category-specific point prompts to ensure comprehensive spatial coverage of all disease regions. To subsequently eliminate prompt redundancy and ensure highly accurate mask generation, it dynamically filters these dense candidates by cross-referencing SAM's iterative mask confidence with the category-specific semantic consistency derived from DINOv2. Ultimately, SGPer distills a highly informative set of prompts to activate SAM's geometric priors, achieving precise and robust segmentation that remains strictly invariant to temporal appearance changes. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that SGPer consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance on wheat disease and organ segmentation benchmarks, especially in data-constrained scenarios.

AI.tldr: SGPer是一种小麦病害语义-几何先验协同分割框架，利用DINOv2提供类别感知的语义先验处理生长阶段的外观变化，并将其转换为密集的空间提示引导SAM实现病害边界的精确定位。
AI.motivation: 小麦病害分割面临严重的类内时间变化问题，不同生长阶段的外观差异显著，从头收集具有代表性的训练数据集既费时又不切实际。
AI.method: SGPer将病害分割视为疾病语义感知与病害边界定位的耦合任务。核心思路是：1）预训练DINOv2提供处理外观变化的鲁棒类别感知语义先验；2）将这些先验转换为粗空间提示引导SAM进行边界定位。具体设计了疾病敏感适配器插入DINOv2和SAM以对齐预训练表示与疾病特征；将DINOv2特征转换为密集的类别特定点提示；通过交叉参考SAM的迭代掩码置信度与DINOv2的类别语义一致性来过滤冗余提示；最终提取高信息量提示激活SAM的几何先验。
AI.result: 在小麦病害和器官分割基准数据集上始终达到最先进的性能，尤其是在数据受限场景下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 通过语义-几何先验协同，SGPer实现了严格不变的时间外观变化下的精确且鲁棒的分害分割。

relevance_reason: This paper is about agricultural wheat disease segmentation using DINOv2 and SAM, which is completely outside the target domain of 3D Human Motion Generation / Computer Graphics. While it mentions DINOv2 and SAM (vision models with visual feature extraction), these are used for medical/agricultural image segmentation, not for 2D-to-3D motion reconstruction or human motion generation. The application domain (agriculture/plant pathology) has no relevance to human motion generation, the pain points are entirely different, and the methods serve a different purpose entirely.

title: VideoStir: Understanding Long Videos via Spatio-Temporally Structured and Intent-Aware RAG
summary: Scaling multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to long videos is constrained by limited context windows. While retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a promising remedy by organizing query-relevant visual evidence into a compact context, most existing methods (i) flatten videos into independent segments, breaking their inherent spatio-temporal structure, and (ii) depend on explicit semantic matching, which can miss cues that are implicitly relevant to the query's intent. To overcome these limitations, we propose VideoStir, a structured and intent-aware long-video RAG framework. It firstly structures a video as a spatio-temporal graph at clip level, and then performs multi-hop retrieval to aggregate evidence across distant yet contextually related events. Furthermore, it introduces an MLLM-backed intent-relevance scorer that retrieves frames based on their alignment with the query's reasoning intent. To support this capability, we curate IR-600K, a large-scale dataset tailored for learning frame-query intent alignment. Experiments show that VideoStir is competitive with state-of-the-art baselines without relying on auxiliary information, highlighting the promise of shifting long-video RAG from flattened semantic matching to structured, intent-aware reasoning. Codes and checkpoints are available at Github.

AI.tldr: VideoStir是一种针对长视频的结构化、意图感知的检索增强生成(RAG)框架，通过将视频表示为时空图并进行多跳检索来解决传统方法破坏视频时空结构的问题，同时引入基于MLLM的意图相关性评分器来对齐查询的推理意图，并构建了IR-600K数据集来学习帧-查询意图对齐。
AI.motivation: 将多模态大型语言模型(MLLM)扩展到长视频受限于有限的上下文窗口。现有检索增强生成方法存在两个主要问题：(1)将视频扁平化为独立片段，破坏了其内在的时空结构；(2)依赖显式语义匹配，可能遗漏与查询意图隐式相关的线索。
AI.method: 提出VideoStir框架，包含三个核心组件：1)将视频结构化为 clip 级别的时空图；2)执行多跳检索以聚合跨越遥远但上下文相关事件的信息；3)引入基于MLLM的意图相关性评分器，根据帧与查询推理意图的对齐程度进行检索。为支持该能力，构建了IR-600K大规模数据集用于学习帧-查询意图对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明VideoStir在不使用辅助信息的情况下与最先进的基线方法具有竞争力，证明了长视频RAG从扁平化语义匹配向结构化、意图感知推理转变的可行性。
AI.conclusion: VideoStir成功地将长视频RAG从扁平化语义匹配转向结构化、意图感知的推理范式，为解决长视频理解中的上下文窗口限制问题提供了新思路。

title: Multi-Agent Pathfinding with Non-Unit Integer Edge Costs via Enhanced Conflict-Based Search and Graph Discretization
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures, submitted to cs.AI, Multi-Agent Systems, Pathfinding Optimization
summary: Multi-Agent Pathfinding (MAPF) plays a critical role in various domains. Traditional MAPF methods typically assume unit edge costs and single-timestep actions, which limit their applicability to real-world scenarios. MAPFR extends MAPF to handle non-unit costs with real-valued edge costs and continuous-time actions, but its geometric collision model leads to an unbounded state space that compromises solver efficiency. In this paper, we propose MAPFZ, a novel MAPF variant on graphs with non-unit integer costs that preserves a finite state space while offering improved realism over classical MAPF. To solve MAPFZ efficiently, we develop CBS-NIC, an enhanced Conflict-Based Search framework incorporating time-interval-based conflict detection and an improved Safe Interval Path Planning (SIPP) algorithm. Additionally, we propose Bayesian Optimization for Graph Design (BOGD), a discretization method for non-unit edge costs that balances efficiency and accuracy with a sub-linear regret bound. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods in runtime and success rate across diverse benchmark scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAPFZ——一种在非单位整数代价图上的多智能体路径规划变体，结合CBS-NIC（增强的基于冲突的搜索）算法和BOGD（贝叶斯优化图设计）离散化方法，在保持有限状态空间的同时提高了真实性和求解效率。
AI.motivation: 传统MAPF方法假设单位边代价和单时间步动作，限制了其在现实场景中的应用；MAPFR虽然处理非单位代价和连续时间动作，但其几何碰撞模型导致状态空间无界，影响求解器效率。
AI.method: 1) 提出MAPFZ变体：在非单位整数代价图上保持有限状态空间；2) 开发CBS-NIC：增强的基于冲突的搜索框架，包含基于时间间隔的冲突检测和改进的安全区间路径规划(SIPP)；3) 提出BOGD：用于非单位边代价的离散化方法，具有次线性遗憾 bound。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多样化的基准测试场景中，在运行时间和成功率方面均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过MAPFZ变体和CBS-NIC算法，有效解决了非单位代价下的多智能体路径规划问题，BOGD离散化方法在效率和准确性之间取得了良好平衡。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) for robot navigation - a robotics/AI planning problem dealing with collision-free path planning for multiple agents on graphs. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are completely different: this is about robot path planning algorithms (CBS, graph discretization), while the research profile is about human motion generation from video, diffusion-based video generation, and 2D-to-3D motion reconstruction. Even the concept of "motion" is entirely different - robot path planning vs. human motion synthesis.

title: Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation Meets SAM3
summary: Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation (FSS) focuses on segmenting novel object categories from only a handful of annotated examples. Most existing approaches rely on extensive episodic training to learn transferable representations, which is both computationally demanding and sensitive to distribution shifts. In this work, we revisit FSS from the perspective of modern vision foundation models and explore the potential of Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3) as a training-free solution. By repurposing its Promptable Concept Segmentation (PCS) capability, we adopt a simple spatial concatenation strategy that places support and query images into a shared canvas, allowing a fully frozen SAM3 to perform segmentation without any fine-tuning or architectural changes. Experiments on PASCAL-$5^i$ and COCO-$20^i$ show that this minimal design already achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming many heavily engineered methods. Beyond empirical gains, we uncover that negative prompts can be counterproductive in few-shot settings, where they often weaken target representations and lead to prediction collapse despite their intended role in suppressing distractors. These findings suggest that strong cross-image reasoning can emerge from simple spatial formulations, while also highlighting limitations in how current foundation models handle conflicting prompt signals. Code at: https://github.com/WongKinYiu/FSS-SAM3

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于SAM3的少样本语义分割方法，通过简单的空间拼接策略将支持图像和查询图像组合，利用SAM3的Promptable Concept Segmentation能力实现无需微调的分割。该方法在PASCAL-5^i和COCO-20^i上取得了最先进性能，并发现负提示在少样本设置中会削弱目标表示导致预测崩溃。
AI.motivation: 现有的少样本语义分割方法主要依赖大量的片段式训练（episodic training）来学习可迁移表示，这种方法计算成本高且对分布偏移敏感。作者重新审视少样本语义分割，从现代视觉基础模型的视角出发，探索SAM3作为训练-free解决方案的潜力。
AI.method: 该研究采用SAM3的Promptable Concept Segmentation (PCS)能力，设计了一种空间拼接策略。具体方法是将支持图像和查询图像放置在共享的画布中，使完全冻结的SAM3能够在无需任何微调或架构修改的情况下执行分割任务。
AI.result: 在PASCAL-5^i和COCO-20^i数据集上的实验表明，这种极简设计已经实现了最先进的性能，优于许多经过大量工程设计的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次探索了SAM3在少样本语义分割任务中的潜力，提出了一种无需微调的简单空间拼接策略。核心贡献在于揭示了负提示在少样本场景中的负面影响机制——虽然负提示原本用于抑制干扰物，但在此设置下反而会削弱目标特征表示，导致预测崩溃。这一发现为理解视觉基础模型如何处理冲突提示信号提供了重要见解，表明跨图像推理能力可以通过简单的空间公式化实现，而无需复杂的工程设计。

relevance_reason: This paper is about few-shot semantic segmentation using SAM3, which is a completely different application domain from 3D human motion generation. The research profile deals with 2D-to-3D motion reconstruction, temporal consistency in motion conversion, and diffusion-based video generation for human motion. Semantic segmentation (even with SAM3) addresses none of these pain points and operates in a different domain entirely.

title: Automated Auditing of Hospital Discharge Summaries for Care Transitions
comment: Accepted as a poster at IEEE-ICHI 2026; 3 pages, 2 figure
summary: Incomplete or inconsistent discharge documentation is a primary driver of care fragmentation and avoidable readmissions. Despite its critical role in patient safety, auditing discharge summaries relies heavily on manual review and is difficult to scale. We propose an automated framework for large-scale auditing of discharge summaries using locally deployed Large Language Models (LLMs). Our approach operationalizes core transition-of-care requirements such as follow-up instructions, medication history and changes, patient information and clinical course, etc. into a structured validation checklist of questions based on DISCHARGED framework. Using adult inpatient summaries from the MIMIC-IV database, we utilize a privacy-preserving LLM to identify the presence, absence, or ambiguity of key documentation elements. This work demonstrates the feasibility of scalable, automated clinical auditing and provides a foundation for systematic quality improvement in electronic health record documentation.

AI.tldr: 研究提出使用本地部署的LLM自动审核出院摘要，通过DISCHARGED框架将转诊护理要求转化为结构化检查清单，在MIMIC-IV数据库上验证了可扩展自动临床审核的可行性。
AI.motivation: 不完整或不一致的出院文档是护理碎片化和可避免的再入院的主要驱动因素。尽管出院摘要对患者安全至关重要，但审核工作主要依赖人工审查，难以规模化实施。
AI.method: 提出了一种使用本地部署的大型语言模型（LLM）进行大规模自动审核出院摘要的框架。该方法将核心的转诊护理要求（如随访指示、用药历史和变更、患者信息和临床过程等）操作化为基于DISCHARGED框架的结构化验证检查清单问题。使用MIMIC-IV数据库的成人住院患者摘要，利用隐私保护型LLM识别关键文档元素的存在、缺失或模糊性。
AI.result: 展示了可扩展的自动临床审核的可行性，为电子健康记录文档的系统性质量改进提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了利用LLM进行自动化出院文档审核的可行性，为提高 EHR 文档质量和患者安全提供了新的技术方案。

The application domains are completely different: healthcare/clinical vs. computer graphics/motion generation. The paper addresses hospital discharge summary auditing - entirely textual clinical documentation. Even the mention of "LLM" in both contexts does not create relevance as they're used for completely different applications.

title: Human Interaction-Aware 3D Reconstruction from a Single Image
summary: Reconstructing textured 3D human models from a single image is fundamental for AR/VR and digital human applications. However, existing methods mostly focus on single individuals and thus fail in multi-human scenes, where naive composition of individual reconstructions often leads to artifacts such as unrealistic overlaps, missing geometry in occluded regions, and distorted interactions. These limitations highlight the need for approaches that incorporate group-level context and interaction priors. We introduce a holistic method that explicitly models both group- and instance-level information. To mitigate perspective-induced geometric distortions, we first transform the input into a canonical orthographic space. Our primary component, Human Group-Instance Multi-View Diffusion (HUG-MVD), then generates complete multi-view normals and images by jointly modeling individuals and group context to resolve occlusions and proximity. Subsequently, the Human Group-Instance Geometric Reconstruction (HUG-GR) module optimizes the geometry by leveraging explicit, physics-based interaction priors to enforce physical plausibility and accurately model inter-human contact. Finally, the multi-view images are fused into a high-fidelity texture. Together, these components form our complete framework, HUG3D. Extensive experiments show that HUG3D significantly outperforms both single-human and existing multi-human methods, producing physically plausible, high-fidelity 3D reconstructions of interacting people from a single image. Project page: https://jongheean11.github.io/HUG3D_project

AI.tldr: 本文提出HUG3D框架，从单张图像重建多个交互人物的3D模型。通过将输入变换到规范正交空间，然后利用HUG-MVD生成多视角法线和图像，最后用HUG-GR模块基于物理先验优化几何，实现高保真、物理可信的3D重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要聚焦于单人场景，在多人场景中简单组合单人重建会导致 artifacts（如不现实的遮挡、缺失几何、变形交互），需要显式建模群体级上下文和交互先验来解决遮挡和邻近问题。
AI.method: 提出两阶段方法：（1）将输入变换到规范正交空间以减轻透视几何畸变；（2）HUG-MVD组件通过联合建模个体和群体上下文生成完整多视角法线和图像以解决遮挡和邻近问题；（3）HUG-GR组件利用显式物理交互先验优化几何，实施物理可行性并准确建模人际接触。
AI.result: 广泛实验表明HUG3D显著优于现有单人和多人方法，能够从单张图像生成物理可信、高保真的交互人物3D重建。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的HUG3D框架成功解决了多人场景下单图像3D重建的难题，通过群体-实例多视角扩散和几何重建模块，有效处理了遮挡和交互问题，为AR/VR和数字人应用提供了新方案。

The key differences: (1) Application domain mismatch - the profile seeks temporal motion generation from video, while this paper addresses static 3D shape reconstruction from a single image; (2) No temporal component - the paper doesn't address video-to-motion conversion or temporal consistency; (3) Different goal - reconstructing 3D geometry vs generating motion sequences; (4) Pain points misalignment - profile focuses on domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion, quality of extracted features, temporal consistency; paper focuses on handling multiple people and physical plausibility in static reconstruction.

title: Adaptive Serverless Resource Management via Slot-Survival Prediction and Event-Driven Lifecycle Control
summary: Serverless computing eliminates infrastructure management overhead but introduces significant challenges regarding cold start latency and resource utilization. Traditional static resource allocation often leads to inefficiencies under variable workloads, resulting in performance degradation or excessive costs. This paper presents an adaptive engineering framework that optimizes serverless performance through event-driven architecture and probabilistic modeling. We propose a dual-strategy mechanism that dynamically adjusts idle durations and employs an intelligent request waiting strategy based on slot survival predictions. By leveraging sliding window aggregation and asynchronous processing, our system proactively manages resource lifecycles. Experimental results show that our approach reduces cold starts by up to 51.2% and improves cost-efficiency by nearly 2x compared to baseline methods in multi-cloud environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应工程框架，通过事件驱动架构和概率建模优化serverless性能，采用双策略机制动态管理资源生命周期，在多云环境中实现了冷启动降低51.2%和成本效率提升近2倍的效果。
AI.motivation: Serverless计算虽然消除了基础设施管理开销，但带来了显著的冷启动延迟和资源利用率问题。传统静态资源分配在可变工作负载下效率低下，导致性能下降或成本过高。
AI.method: 提出了基于事件驱动架构和概率建模的自适应工程框架，采用双策略机制：1) 动态调整空闲持续时间；2) 基于槽位存活预测的智能请求等待策略。结合滑动窗口聚合和异步处理技术，实现资源生命周期的主动管理。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在多云环境下相比基线方法冷启动降低51.2%，成本效率提升近2倍。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过预测性的资源生命周期管理，有效解决了serverless架构中的冷启动问题和资源利用率低下的问题，为多云环境下的serverless性能优化提供了新的工程思路。

It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different: cloud computing vs. computer graphics/motion generation. None of the methods (event-driven architecture, slot-survival prediction, probability modeling) relate to diffusion-based video generation, vision-language models, visual feature extraction pipelines, or 2D-to-3D motion reconstruction. This is a systems/infrastructure paper that addresses completely different pain points (cloud resource utilization vs. domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion).

title: Not All Agents Matter: From Global Attention Dilution to Risk-Prioritized Game Planning
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving resides not in the integration of perception and planning, but rather in the dynamic multi-agent game within a unified representation space. Most existing end-to-end models treat all agents equally, hindering the decoupling of real collision threats from complex backgrounds. To address this issue, We introduce the concept of Risk-Prioritized Game Planning, and propose GameAD, a novel framework that models end-to-end autonomous driving as a risk-aware game problem. The GameAD integrates Risk-Aware Topology Anchoring, Strategic Payload Adapter, Minimax Risk-Aware Sparse Attention, and Risk Consistent Equilibrium Stabilization to enable game theoretic decision making with risk prioritized interactions. We also present the Planning Risk Exposure metric, which quantifies the cumulative risk intensity of planned trajectories over a long horizon for safe autonomous driving. Extensive experiments on the nuScenes and Bench2Drive datasets show that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, especially in terms of trajectory safety.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GameAD框架，将端到端自动驾驶建模为风险感知博弈问题，通过风险优先的拓扑锚定、战略载荷适配器、极小化风险感知稀疏注意力和风险一致均衡稳定等技术，实现安全优先的自动驾驶决策。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶模型将所有智能体平等对待，难以从复杂背景中解耦真实的碰撞威胁；同时，传统方法未能充分考虑动态多智能体博弈中的风险因素。
AI.method: 提出风险优先博弈规划概念，集成风险感知拓扑锚定、战略载荷适配器、极小化风险感知稀疏注意力和风险一致均衡稳定四个模块；引入规划风险暴露度量指标。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Bench2Drive数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其是在轨迹安全性方面。
AI.conclusion: 通过将自动驾驶建模为风险感知的博弈问题，能够更好地实现安全优先的端到端自动驾驶决策。

relevance_reason: The paper is about autonomous driving (GameAD framework for risk-aware game planning in self-driving cars), which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. While the research profile deals with 2D-to-3D motion conversion, visual feature extraction, and diffusion models for human motion, this paper addresses multi-agent博弈 planning and trajectory safety for autonomous vehicles. title: OntoTKGE: Ontology-Enhanced Temporal Knowledge Graph Extrapolation
summary: Temporal knowledge graph (TKG) extrapolation is an important task that aims to predict future facts through historical interaction information within KG snapshots. A key challenge for most existing TKG extrapolation models is handling entities with sparse historical interaction. The ontological knowledge is beneficial for alleviating this sparsity issue by enabling these entities to inherit behavioral patterns from other entities with the same concept, which is ignored by previous studies. In this paper, we propose a novel encoder-decoder framework OntoTKGE that leverages the ontological knowledge from the ontology-view KG (i.e., a KG modeling hierarchical relations among abstract concepts as well as the connections between concepts and entities) to guide the TKG extrapolation model's learning process through the effective integration of the ontological and temporal knowledge, thereby enhancing entity embeddings. OntoTKGE is flexible enough to adapt to many TKG extrapolation models. Extensive experiments on four data sets demonstrate that OntoTKGE not only significantly improves the performance of many TKG extrapolation models but also surpasses many SOTA baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OntoTKGE框架，利用本体知识图谱中的层次化概念和概念-实体连接关系来指导时序知识图谱外推任务，通过有效整合本体知识和时序知识来增强实体嵌入，缓解稀疏交互实体的预测难题。
AI.motivation: 现有时序知识图谱外推模型面临的关键挑战是如何处理历史交互稀疏的实体。本体知识能够使这些实体从具有相同概念的实体继承行为模式，从而缓解稀疏性问题，但这一重要信息在先前的研究中被忽视了。
AI.method: 提出OntoTKGE框架，包含编码器-解码器结构，从本体视图知识图谱（建模抽象概念间的层次关系以及概念与实体的连接）中提取本体知识，通过有效整合本体知识与时序知识来指导时序知识图谱外推模型的学习过程，从而增强实体嵌入。该框架具有足够的灵活性，可以适配多种时序知识图谱外推模型。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的广泛实验表明，OntoTKGE不仅能显著提升多种时序知识图谱外推模型的性能，还超越了众多当前最优的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: OntoTKGE框架通过引入本体知识有效解决了稀疏实体预测的难题，其设计具有良好的通用性和适应性，可为各类时序知识图谱外推模型提供性能提升，具有重要的应用价值。

The application domain is entirely different (knowledge graphs vs. graphics/motion), and none of the methods or pain points from the research profile are addressed.

title: A Synthetic Eye Movement Dataset for Script Reading Detection: Real Trajectory Replay on a 3D Simulator
comment: Synthetic eye movement dataset generation via 3D eye simulator; iris trajectory replay; script reading detection; behavioral data augmentation
summary:
Large vision-language models have achieved remarkable capabilities by training on massive internet-scale data, yet a fundamental asymmetry persists: while LLMs can leverage self-supervised pretraining on abundant text and image data, the same is not true for many behavioral modalities. Video-based behavioral data -- gestures, eye movements, social signals -- remains scarce, expensive to annotate, and privacy-sensitive. A promising alternative is simulation: replace real data collection with controlled synthetic generation to produce automatically labeled data at scale.
  We introduce infrastructure for this paradigm applied to eye movement, a behavioral signal with applications across vision-language modeling, virtual reality, robotics, accessibility systems, and cognitive science. We present a pipeline for generating synthetic labeled eye movement video by extracting real human iris trajectories from reference videos and replaying them on a 3D eye movement simulator via headless browser automation. Applying this to the task of script-reading detection during video interviews, we release final_dataset_v1: 144 sessions (72 reading, 72 conversation) totaling 12 hours of synthetic eye movement video at 25fps.
  Evaluation shows that generated trajectories preserve the temporal dynamics of the source data (KS D < 0.14 across all metrics). A matched frame-by-frame comparison reveals that the 3D simulator exhibits bounded sensitivity at reading-scale movements, attributable to the absence of coupled head movement -- a finding that informs future simulator design. The pipeline, dataset, and evaluation tools are released to support downstream behavioral classifier development at the intersection of behavioral modeling and vision-language systems.

AI.tldr: 针对视觉-语言模型训练中行为数据稀缺的问题，提出利用3D眼动模拟器生成合成眼动视频的pipeline，生成了12小时的标注数据用于视频面试中的脚本阅读检测任务，并验证了合成数据的时间动态保真度。
AI.motivation: 解决视觉-语言模型训练中的数据不对称问题：文本和图像数据丰富，但视频行为数据(眼动、手势、社交信号)稀缺、标注成本高且涉及隐私。
AI.method: 提出一种基于3D眼动模拟器的合成数据生成pipeline：1)从真实视频中提取虹膜轨迹; 2)通过headless浏览器自动化在3D模拟器上重放轨迹; 3)生成自动标注的合成眼动视频。数据集包含144个会话(72阅读/72对话)，共12小时，25fps。
AI.result: 生成的轨迹保留了源数据的时间动态特性(各指标KS D < 0.14)。3D模拟器在阅读尺度运动上表现出bounded sensitivity，原因是缺少耦合的头部运动。
AI.conclusion: 该pipeline可生成preserve temporal dynamics的合成眼动数据(KS D < 0.14)，但在reading-scale movements上存在bounded sensitivity，这源于缺少耦合的头部运动。数据集和评估工具已发布以支持下游行为分类器开发。

title: Can We Trust a Black-box LLM? LLM Untrustworthy Boundary Detection via Bias-Diffusion and Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown a high capability in answering questions on a diverse range of topics. However, these models sometimes produce biased, ideologized or incorrect responses, limiting their applications if there is no clear understanding of which topics their answers can be trusted. In this research, we introduce a novel algorithm, named as GMRL-BD, designed to identify the untrustworthy boundaries (in terms of topics) of a given LLM, with black-box access to the LLM and under specific query constraints. Based on a general Knowledge Graph (KG) derived from Wikipedia, our algorithm incorporates with multiple reinforcement learning agents to efficiently identify topics (some nodes in KG) where the LLM is likely to generate biased answers. Our experiments demonstrated the efficiency of our algorithm, which can detect the untrustworthy boundary with just limited queries to the LLM. Additionally, we have released a new dataset containing popular LLMs including Llama2, Vicuna, Falcon, Qwen2, Gemma2 and Yi-1.5, along with labels indicating the topics on which each LLM is likely to be biased.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GMRL-BD算法，通过结合维基百科知识图谱和多智能体强化学习，在黑盒访问场景下识别LLM可能产生偏见的_topic边界，并通过有限查询实现高效检测，同时发布了包含Llama2、Vicuna等主流LLM的偏见主题数据集。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型(LLM)在多种主题的问题回答中表现出色，但有时会产生偏见、意识形态化或错误的回答，这限制了其在实际应用中的可信度。由于缺乏对LLM可信度边界的清晰理解，急需一种方法来识别哪些主题的回答不可信任。
AI.method: 提出名为GMRL-BD的创新算法，基于维基百科构建通用知识图谱(KG)，在仅需黑盒访问LLM且满足特定查询约束的条件下，利用多智能体强化学习 Agents 高效识别LLM可能产生偏见的_topic边界（知识图谱中的特定节点）。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法具有较高效率，只需对LLM进行有限次数的查询即可检测出不可信的边界。此外，研究团队发布了包含Llama2、Vicuna、Qwen2等6种主流LLM的新数据集，并标注了各模型可能产生偏见的_topic标签。
AI.conclusion: GMRL-BD算法能够有效识别LLM的不可信_topic边界，在有限查询预算下实现高效检测，为评估LLM的可信度和安全应用提供了有价值的方法和数据支持。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM bias detection and trustworthiness in NLP/AI safety领域，根本不涉及任何Computer Graphics或3D Human Motion Generation。虽然标题提到"bias-diffusion"，但这是关于偏见的扩散，与research profile中的Diffusion-based Video Generation完全无关。Pain points完全不匹配：一个关注2D视频到3Dmotion的转换，另一个关注LLM的可信度和偏见检测。应用领域完全不同，这是关于NLP/AI safety的论文，与3D人体动作生成毫无关系。

title: Unifying VLM-Guided Flow Matching and Spectral Anomaly Detection for Interpretable Veterinary Diagnosis
summary: Automatic diagnosis of canine pneumothorax is challenged by data scarcity and the need for trustworthy models. To address this, we first introduce a public, pixel-level annotated dataset to facilitate research. We then propose a novel diagnostic paradigm that reframes the task as a synergistic process of signal localization and spectral detection. For localization, our method employs a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to guide an iterative Flow Matching process, which progressively refines segmentation masks to achieve superior boundary accuracy. For detection, the segmented mask is used to isolate features from the suspected lesion. We then apply Random Matrix Theory (RMT), a departure from traditional classifiers, to analyze these features. This approach models healthy tissue as predictable random noise and identifies pneumothorax by detecting statistically significant outlier eigenvalues that represent a non-random pathological signal. The high-fidelity localization from Flow Matching is crucial for purifying the signal, thus maximizing the sensitivity of our RMT detector. This synergy of generative segmentation and first-principles statistical analysis yields a highly accurate and interpretable diagnostic system (source code is available at: https://github.com/Pu-Wang-alt/Canine-pneumothorax).

AI.tldr: 针对犬气胸自动诊断的数据稀缺问题，该研究创建了首个公开的像素级标注数据集，并提出将诊断任务重新定义为信号定位和光谱检测的协同过程。定位阶段使用VLM指导的Flow Matching实现高精度分割，检测阶段则创新性地采用随机矩阵理论(RMT)分析分割后的特征，通过识别非随机病理信号的特征值来诊断疾病。
AI.motivation: 犬气胸自动诊断面临数据稀缺和需要可信赖模型两大挑战。
AI.method: ①定位：使用视觉语言模型(VLM)指导迭代流匹配(Flow Matching)过程，逐步细化分割掩码以实现更好的边界精度。②检测：使用分割掩膜隔离可疑病变的特征，然后应用随机矩阵理论(RMT)分析——将健康组织建模为可预测的随机噪声，通过检测表示非随机病理信号的特征值来识别气胸。
AI.result: 该协同方法结合生成式分割和第一原理统计分析，实现了高准确性和可解释性的诊断系统。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过结合生成式分割(VLM+Flow Matching)和第一原理统计分析(RMT)，实现了高精度和可解释的犬气胸诊断系统。高保真定位对于净化信号至关重要，最大化了RMT检测器的灵敏度。开源代码已发布于GitHub。

relevance_reason: This paper is about veterinary medical diagnosis (canine pneumothorax), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. While it uses VLM and Flow Matching, these methods are applied to medical image segmentation, not video generation or 2D-to-3D motion reconstruction. The application domain is entirely different - medical imaging vs human motion generation. This is a case of using similar methods in a completely wrong application domain.

title: A Weak-Signal-Aware Framework for Subsurface Defect Detection: Mechanisms for Enhancing Low-SCR Hyperbolic Signatures
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, 5 tables. Accepted by International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)
summary: Subsurface defect detection via Ground Penetrating Radar is challenged by "weak signals" faint diffraction hyperbolas with low signal-to-clutter ratios, high wavefield similarity, and geometric degradation. Existing lightweight detectors prioritize efficiency over sensitivity, failing to preserve low-frequency structures or decouple heterogeneous clutter. We propose WSA-Net, a framework designed to enhance faint signatures through physical-feature reconstruction. Moving beyond simple parameter reduction, WSA-Net integrates four mechanisms: Signal preservation using partial convolutions; Clutter suppression via heterogeneous grouping attention; Geometric reconstruction to sharpen hyperbolic arcs; Context anchoring to resolve semantic ambiguities. Evaluations on the RTSTdataset show WSA-Net achieves 0.6958 mAP@0.5 and 164 FPS with only 2.412 M parameters. Results prove that signal-centric awareness in lightweight architectures effectively reduces false negatives in infrastructure inspection.

AI.tldr: WSA-Net是一种用于探地雷达(GPR) subsurface defect detection的轻量级检测框架,通过信号保留、杂波抑制、几何重建和上下文锚定四种机制增强微弱信号检测,在RTST数据集上以仅2.412M参数实现0.6958 mAP@0.5和164 FPS。
AI.motivation: GPR subsurface defect detection面临"弱信号"挑战:微弱的衍射双曲线低信杂比、高波场相似性和几何退化。现有的轻量级检测器优先考虑效率而忽视敏感性,无法保留低频结构或解耦异构杂波。
AI.method: 提出WSA-Net框架,集成四个机制:1)使用部分卷积进行信号保留;2)通过异构分组注意力进行杂波抑制;3)几何重建以锐化双曲线弧;4)上下文锚定解决语义歧义。
AI.result: 在RTST数据集上,WSA-Net实现了0.6958 mAP@0.5和164 FPS推理速度,仅使用2.412M参数。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级架构中的信号中心感知可以有效减少基础设施检测中的假阴性,在效率和敏感性之间取得良好平衡。

The application domain is geological sensing/civil engineering, not human motion synthesis or analysis. title: Thinking Diffusion: Penalize and Guide Visual-Grounded Reasoning in Diffusion Multimodal Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are emerging as promising alternatives to autoregressive (AR) LLMs. Recently, this paradigm has been extended to multimodal tasks, leading to the development of diffusion multimodal large language models (dMLLMs). These models are expected to retain the reasoning capabilities of LLMs while enabling faster inference through parallel generation. However, when combined with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning, dMLLMs exhibit two critical issues. First, we observe that dMLLMs often generate the final answer token at a very early timestep. This trend indicates that the model determines the answer before sufficient reasoning, leading to degraded reasoning performance. Second, during the initial timesteps, dMLLMs show minimal dependency on visual prompts, exhibiting a fundamentally different pattern of visual information utilization compared to AR vision-language models. In summary, these findings indicate that dMLLMs tend to generate premature final answers without sufficiently grounding on visual inputs. To address these limitations, we propose Position and Step Penalty (PSP) and Visual Reasoning Guidance (VRG). PSP penalizes tokens in later positions during early timesteps, delaying premature answer generation and encouraging progressive reasoning across timesteps. VRG, inspired by classifier-free guidance, amplifies visual grounding signals to enhance the model's alignment with visual evidence. Extensive experiments across various dMLLMs demonstrate that our method achieves up to 7.5% higher accuracy while delivering more than 3x speedup compared to reasoning with four times more diffusion steps.

AI.tldr: 扩散多模态大语言模型(dMLLMs)在结合思维链推理时存在两个关键问题：1) 模型在很早的时间步就生成最终答案，导致推理不充分；2) 初始时间步对视觉输入依赖不足。提出位置步骤惩罚(PSP)和视觉推理引导(VRG)两个方法来改善这些问题。
AI.motivation: dMLLMs有望保留LLM的推理能力同时实现并行生成加速，但与CoT结合时出现推理退化问题，需要解决模型过早生成答案和视觉信息利用不足的情况。
AI.method: 1. PSP (Position and Step Penalty): 惩罚早期时间步的后续位置token，延迟过早答案生成；2. VRG (Visual Reasoning Guidance): 借鉴无分类器引导方法，放大视觉 grounding 信号。
AI.result: 在多种dMLLMs上实验表明，方法可提升最高7.5%准确率，同时相比使用4倍扩散步骤的推理实现超过3倍加速。
AI.conclusion: PSP和VRG能有效解决dMLLMs中过早生成答案和视觉信息利用不足的问题，实现更好的推理性能与速度平衡。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on diffusion-based multimodal language models for visual reasoning tasks (VQA), which is completely unrelated to the research profile's domain of 3D Human Motion Generation. While both involve diffusion models, the application domains are fundamentally different: the paper addresses text generation with visual grounding for reasoning tasks, not 3D motion generation, 2D-to-3D pose recovery, or computer graphics motion synthesis. The pain points and methods (VLM for quality assessment in motion generation vs VLM for visual reasoning) are entirely different applications.

title: Benchmarking Vision-Language Models under Contradictory Virtual Content Attacks in Augmented Reality
summary: Augmented reality (AR) has rapidly expanded over the past decade. As AR becomes increasingly integrated into daily life, its security and reliability emerge as critical challenges. Among various threats, contradictory virtual content attacks, where malicious or inconsistent virtual elements are introduced into the user's view, pose a unique risk by misleading users, creating semantic confusion, or delivering harmful information. In this work, we systematically model such attacks and present ContrAR, a novel benchmark for evaluating the robustness of vision-language models (VLMs) against virtual content manipulation and contradiction in AR. ContrAR contains 312 real-world AR videos validated by 10 human participants. We further benchmark 11 VLMs, including both commercial and open-source models. Experimental results reveal that while current VLMs exhibit reasonable understanding of contradictory virtual content, room still remains for improvement in detecting and reasoning about adversarial content manipulations in AR environments. Moreover, balancing detection accuracy and latency remains challenging.

AI.tldr: 提出了ContrAR基准，用于评估视觉语言模型在AR环境中对抗虚拟内容操纵和矛盾攻击的鲁棒性，包含312个真实AR视频和11个VLMs的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 随着AR技术日益融入日常生活，其安全性和可靠性成为关键挑战，其中矛盾虚拟内容攻击（将恶意或不一致的虚拟元素注入用户视图）会带来误导用户、造成语义混淆或传递有害信息的独特风险。
AI.method: 构建了包含312个真实AR视频的ContrAR基准测试，验证了11个VLMs（包括商业和开源模型）的性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，尽管当前VLMs对矛盾虚拟内容展现出合理的理解能力，但在检测和推理AR环境中的对抗性内容操作方面仍有改进空间。
AI.conclusion: ContrAR基准测试揭示了当前VLMs在检测和推理AR环境中对抗性内容操作方面仍有提升空间，同时平衡检测准确性和延迟仍具挑战性。

The pain points in the research profile (domain gap, 3D pose recovery, temporal consistency in motion conversion) are not addressed at all. title: OmniDiagram: Advancing Unified Diagram Code Generation via Visual Interrogation Reward
summary: The paradigm of programmable diagram generation is evolving rapidly, playing a crucial role in structured visualization. However, most existing studies are confined to a narrow range of task formulations and language support, constraining their applicability to diverse diagram types. In this work, we propose OmniDiagram, a unified framework that incorporates diverse diagram code languages and task definitions. To address the challenge of aligning code logic with visual fidelity in Reinforcement Learning (RL), we introduce a novel visual feedback strategy named Visual Interrogation Verifies All (\textsc{Viva}). Unlike brittle syntax-based rules or pixel-level matching, \textsc{Viva} rewards the visual structure of rendered diagrams through a generative approach. Specifically, \textsc{Viva} actively generates targeted visual inquiries to scrutinize diagram visual fidelity and provides fine-grained feedback for optimization. This mechanism facilitates a self-evolving training process, effectively obviating the need for manually annotated ground truth code. Furthermore, we construct M3$^2$Diagram, the first large-scale diagram code generation dataset, containing over 196k high-quality instances. Experimental results confirm that the combination of SFT and our \textsc{Viva}-based RL allows OmniDiagram to establish a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) across diagram code generation benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出OmniDiagram，一个统一的图表代码生成框架，通过Viva视觉反馈策略和大规模数据集M3²Diagram实现图表代码生成的新的最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有可编程图表生成研究局限于狭窄的任务定义和语言支持，难以应用于多样化的图表类型。
AI.method: 提出统一框架OmniDiagram整合多种图表代码语言和任务定义；引入Viva视觉反馈策略，通过生成式方法主动生成视觉 inquiry 来检查图表视觉保真度并提供细粒度反馈，结合SFT和Viva-based RL进行训练。
AI.result: 构建了首个大规模图表代码生成数据集M3²Diagram，包含超过19.6万高质量实例；OmniDiagram在图表代码生成基准上建立新的SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 通过SFT和Viva-based RL的组合，OmniDiagram有效解决了图表代码生成中视觉保真度对齐的挑战，无需人工标注的ground truth代码即可实现自进化训练。

relevance_reason: This paper is about diagram code generation (creating code for charts/graphs), while the research profile is about 3D Human Motion Generation. These are completely different application domains - one generates code for statistical diagrams, the other generates 3D human motion from 2D video. Although both mention Vision-Language Models (VLM), the VLM is used for diagram visual fidelity checking, not for 3D motion quality assessment or 2D-to-3D motion reconstruction. The pain points (2D-to-3D conversion, 3D pose recovery, temporal consistency) are entirely unrelated to diagram generation.

title: Geometrical Cross-Attention and Nonvoid Voxelization for Efficient 3D Medical Image Segmentation
comment: 20 pages, 13 figures, supplementary material included, submitted to Medical Image Analysis
summary: Accurate segmentation of 3D medical scans is crucial for clinical diagnostics and treatment planning, yet existing methods often fail to achieve both high accuracy and computational efficiency across diverse anatomies and imaging modalities. To address these challenges, we propose GCNV-Net, a novel 3D medical segmentation framework that integrates a Tri-directional Dynamic Nonvoid Voxel Transformer (3DNVT), a Geometrical Cross-Attention module (GCA), and Nonvoid Voxelization. The 3DNVT dynamically partitions relevant voxels along the three orthogonal anatomical planes, namely the transverse, sagittal, and coronal planes, enabling effective modeling of complex 3D spatial dependencies. The GCA mechanism explicitly incorporates geometric positional information during multi-scale feature fusion, significantly enhancing fine-grained anatomical segmentation accuracy. Meanwhile, Nonvoid Voxelization processes only informative regions, greatly reducing redundant computation without compromising segmentation quality, and achieves a 56.13% reduction in FLOPs and a 68.49% reduction in inference latency compared to conventional voxelization. We evaluate GCNV-Net on multiple widely used benchmarks: BraTS2021, ACDC, MSD Prostate, MSD Pancreas, and AMOS2022. Our method achieves state-of-the-art segmentation performance across all datasets, outperforming the best existing methods by 0.65% on Dice, 0.63% on IoU, 1% on NSD, and relatively 14.5% on HD95. All results demonstrate that GCNV-Net effectively balances accuracy and efficiency, and its robustness across diverse organs, disease conditions, and imaging modalities highlights strong potential for clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出GCNV-Net——一种结合三向动态非空体素变换器与几何交叉注意力的3D医学图像分割框架，在多数据集取得最先进性能并大幅降低计算成本
AI.motivation: 现有3D医学扫描分割方法难以在多样解剖结构和成像模态下同时实现高精度与高计算效率的平衡
AI.method: 提出GCNV-Net框架，整合三向动态非空体素Transformer(3DNVT)、几何交叉注意力模块(GCA)和非空体素化技术。3DNVT沿横断面、矢状面和冠状面三个正交解剖平面动态划分相关体素；GCA在多尺度特征融合中融入几何位置信息；非空体素化仅处理信息区域
AI.result: 在BraTS2021、ACDC、MSD前列腺、MSD胰腺及AMOS2022等数据集上取得最优性能：Dice提升0.65%、IoU提升0.63%、NSD提升1%、HD95相对提升14.5%；同时实现FLOPs降低56.13%、推理延迟降低68.49%
AI.conclusion: GCNV-Net有效平衡了精度与效率，在不同器官、疾病状态和成像模态下均展现强鲁棒性，具有显著的临床应用潜力

While both involve 3D processing and attention mechanisms, the application domain, end goal, and use case are entirely different - medical imaging for healthcare vs. human motion generation for graphics/animation. The pain points are also unrelated (medical diagnosis vs. domain gap between 2D video and 3D motion).

title: UniCreative: Unifying Long-form Logic and Short-form Sparkle via Reference-Free Reinforcement Learning
summary: A fundamental challenge in creative writing lies in reconciling the inherent tension between maintaining global coherence in long-form narratives and preserving local expressiveness in short-form texts. While long-context generation necessitates explicit macroscopic planning, short-form creativity often demands spontaneous, constraint-free expression. Existing alignment paradigms, however, typically employ static reward signals and rely heavily on high-quality supervised data, which is costly and difficult to scale. To address this, we propose \textbf{UniCreative}, a unified reference-free reinforcement learning framework. We first introduce \textbf{AC-GenRM}, an adaptive constraint-aware reward model that dynamically synthesizes query-specific criteria to provide fine-grained preference judgments. Leveraging these signals, we propose \textbf{ACPO}, a policy optimization algorithm that aligns models with human preferences across both content quality and structural paradigms without supervised fine-tuning and ground-truth references. Empirical results demonstrate that AC-GenRM aligns closely with expert evaluations, while ACPO significantly enhances performance across diverse writing tasks. Crucially, our analysis reveals an emergent meta-cognitive ability: the model learns to autonomously differentiate between tasks requiring rigorous planning and those favoring direct generation, validating the effectiveness of our direct alignment approach.

AI.tldr: 提出了UniCreative框架，通过自适应约束感知奖励模型AC-GenRM和策略优化算法ACPO，在无需监督微调和真实标签的情况下对齐模型与人类偏好，并展现出自发区分长/短文本任务能力的元认知能力。
AI.motivation: 创意写作中存在长文本需要宏观规划与短文本需要自发表达的根本性张力；现有对齐范式依赖静态奖励信号和高成本标注数据，难以扩展。
AI.method: 提出AC-GenRM自适应约束感知奖励模型，动态合成查询特定标准提供细粒度偏好判断；在此基础上提出ACPO策略优化算法，无需监督微调和真实参考即可对齐模型。
AI.result: AC-GenRM与专家评估高度一致；ACPO在多样化写作任务中显著提升性能；模型展现出元认知能力——自发区分需要严谨规划的任务和适合直接生成的任务。
