title: Cross-Resolution Diffusion Models via Network Pruning
summary: Diffusion models have demonstrated impressive image synthesis performance, yet many UNet-based models are trained at certain fixed resolutions. Their quality tends to degrade when generating images at out-of-training resolutions. We trace this issue to resolution-dependent parameter behaviors, where weights that function well at the default resolution can become adverse when spatial scales shift, weakening semantic alignment and causing structural instability in the UNet architecture. Based on this analysis, this paper introduces CR-Diff, a novel method that improves the cross-resolution visual consistency by pruning some parameters of the diffusion model. Specifically, CR-Diff has two stages. It first performs block-wise pruning to selectively eliminate adverse weights. Then, a pruned output amplification is conducted to further purify the pruned predictions. Empirically, extensive experiments suggest that CR-Diff can improve perceptual fidelity and semantic coherence across various diffusion backbones and unseen resolutions, while largely preserving the performance at default resolutions. Additionally, CR-Diff supports prompt-specific refinement, enabling quality enhancement on demand.

AI.tldr: 扩散模型在训练分辨率之外生成图像时质量下降，论文提出CR-Diff方法通过剪枝参数来提高跨分辨率视觉一致性。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在固定分辨率训练后，在非训练分辨率生成时质量下降。原因在于权重与分辨率相关，在默认分辨率下有效的权重在空间尺度变化时可能变得不利，削弱语义对齐并导致UNet结构不稳定。
AI.method: CR-Diff方法包含两个阶段：(1) 块剪枝：选择性地消除不利权重；(2) 剪枝输出放大：进一步净化剪枝预测。
AI.result: 实验表明CR-Diff可在各种扩散骨干和未见过的分辨率上提高感知保真度和语义一致性，同时保持默认分辨率的性能。此外还支持按需提示特定细化。
AI.conclusion: 通过参数剪枝方法有效解决了扩散模型的跨分辨率一致性问题，方法简单有效且具有普适性。

title: Prior-guided Fusion of Multimodal Features for Change Detection from Optical-SAR Images
summary: Multimodal change detection (MMCD) identifies changed areas in multimodal remote sensing (RS) data, demonstrating significant application value in land use monitoring, disaster assessment, and urban sustainable development. However, literature MMCD approaches exhibit limitations in cross-modal interaction and exploiting modality-specific characteristics. This leads to insufficient modeling of fine-grained change information, thus hindering the precise detection of semantic changes in multimodal data. To address the above problems, we propose STSF-Net, a framework designed for MMCD between optical and SAR images. STSF-Net jointly models modality-specific and spatio-temporal common features to enhance change representations. Specifically, modality-specific features are exploited to capture genuine semantic change signals, while spatio-temporal common features are embedded to suppress pseudo-changes caused by differences in imaging mechanisms. Furthermore, we introduce an optical and SAR feature fusion strategy that adaptively adjusts feature importance based on semantic priors obtained from pre-trained foundational models, enabling semantic-guided adaptive fusion of multi-modal information. In addition, we introduce the Delta-SN6 dataset, the first openly-accessible multiclass MMCD benchmark consisting of very-high-resolution (VHR) fully polarimetric SAR and optical images. Experimental results on Delta-SN6, BRIGHT, and Wuhan-Het datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) by 3.21%, 1.08%, and 1.32% in mIoU, respectively. The associated code and Delta-SN6 dataset will be released at: https://github.com/liuxuanguang/STSF-Net.

AI.tldr: STSF-Net是一种用于光学和SAR图像多模态变化检测的深度学习框架，通过联合建模模态特定特征和时空共性特征来增强变化表示，并引入基于预训练基础模型的语义先验进行自适应特征融合。
AI.motivation: 现有文献中的多模态变化检测方法在跨模态交互和利用模态特定特征方面存在局限性，导致细粒度变化信息建模不足，阻碍了多模态数据中语义变化的精确检测。
AI.method: 提出STSF-Net框架，包含三个关键组件：1）模态特定特征提取，用于捕获真实语义变化信号；2）时空共性特征嵌入，用于抑制由成像机制差异引起的伪变化；3）基于预训练基础模型语义先验的光学与SAR特征自适应融合策略。
AI.result: 在Delta-SN6、BRIGHT和Wuhan-Het数据集上，STSF-Net的mIoU分别比最先进方法提高3.21%、1.08%和1.32%。同时发布了首个开源的多类别多模态变化检测基准数据集Delta-SN6，包含极高分全极化SAR和光学图像。
AI.conclusion: STSF-Net通过有效融合模态特定特征与时空共性特征，并结合语义引导的自适应融合策略，显著提升了多模态变化检测性能，为遥感图像变化监测提供了新的有效方案。

title: Inventory of the 12 007 Low-Dimensional Pseudo-Boolean Landscapes Invariant to Rank, Translation, and Rotation
summary: Many randomized optimization algorithms are rank-invariant, relying solely on the relative ordering of solutions rather than absolute fitness values. We introduce a stronger notion of rank landscape invariance: two problems are equivalent if their ranking, but also their neighborhood structure and symmetries (translation and rotation), induce identical landscapes. This motivates the study of rank landscapes rather than individual functions. While prior work analyzed the rankings of injective function classes in isolation, we provide an exhaustive inventory of the invariant landscape classes for pseudo-Boolean functions of dimensions 1, 2, and 3, including non-injective cases. Our analysis reveals 12,007 classes in total, a significant reduction compared to rank-invariance alone. We find that non-injective functions yield far more invariant landscape classes than injective ones. In addition, complex combinations of topological landscape properties and algorithm behaviors emerge, particularly regarding deceptiveness, neutrality, and the performance of hill-climbing strategies. The inventory serves as a resource for pedagogical purposes and benchmark design, offering a foundation for constructing larger problems with controlled hardness and advancing our understanding of landscape difficulty and algorithm performance.

AI.tldr: 研究引入了排名景观不变性的更强概念，对伪布尔函数的一维、二维和三维情况进行了穷尽的景观类清单编制，发现12,007个不变景观类，非注入函数产生更多类，为景观难度理解和基准设计提供了资源。
AI.motivation: 现有随机优化算法仅依赖于解决方案的相对排序（排名不变性），但作者引入了更强的概念——排名景观不变性，它考虑问题的排名、邻域结构和对称性的综合等价性。这促使研究关注排名景观而非单个函数。
AI.method: 对伪布尔函数的一维、二维和三维情况进行了穷尽的不变景观类清单编制，包括非注入情况。通过分析排名的相对排序、邻域结构和对称性（平移和旋转）来定义等价性。
AI.result: 共发现12,007个不变景观类，相比仅考虑排名不变性显著减少。非注入函数比注入函数产生更多的不变景观类。此外，还发现了关于欺骗性、中性和爬山策略性能的复杂拓扑景观属性与算法行为的组合。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为景观难度和算法性能的理解提供了基础，可用于教学和基准设计，为构建具有受控难度的更大规模问题提供了框架。特别值得注意的是，非注入函数比注入函数产生更多的不变景观类，这表明在设计优化问题时应考虑函数的注入性。

title: Evaluation Before Generation: A Paradigm for Robust Multimodal Sentiment Analysis with Missing Modalities
summary: The missing modality problem poses a fundamental challenge in multimodal sentiment analysis, significantly degrading model accuracy and generalization in real world scenarios. Existing approaches primarily improve robustness through prompt learning and pre trained models. However, two limitations remain. First, the necessity of generating missing modalities lacks rigorous evaluation. Second, the structural dependencies among multimodal prompts and their global coherence are insufficiently explored. To address these issues, a Prompt based Missing Modality Adaptation framework is proposed. A Missing Modality Evaluator is introduced at the input stage to dynamically assess the importance of missing modalities using pretrained models and pseudo labels, thereby avoiding low quality data imputation. Building on this, a Modality invariant Prompt Disentanglement module decomposes shared prompts into modality specific private prompts to capture intrinsic local correlations and improve representation quality. In addition, a Dynamic Prompt Weighting module computes mutual information based weights from cross attention outputs to adaptively suppress interference from missing modalities. To enhance global consistency, a Multi level Prompt Dynamic Connection module integrates shared prompts with self attention outputs through residual connections, leveraging global prompt priors to strengthen key guidance features. Extensive experiments on three public benchmarks, including CMU MOSI, CMU MOSEI, and CH SIMS, demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves state of the art performance and stable results under diverse missing modality settings. The implementation is available at https://github.com/rongfei-chen/ProMMA

AI.tldr: 提出了ProMMA框架解决多模态情感分析中的缺失模态问题，通过缺失模态评估器、提示解耦、动态加权和多级连接四个模块，在三个基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态情感分析中的缺失模态问题是一个关键挑战，现有方法主要通过提示学习和预训练模型来提高鲁棒性，但存在两个主要局限：1) 缺乏对生成缺失模态必要性的严格评估；2) 多模态提示之间的结构依赖性和全局一致性探索不足。
AI.method: 提出了ProMMA框架，包含四个核心模块：1) 缺失模态评估器，在输入阶段使用预训练模型和伪标签动态评估缺失模态的重要性，避免低质量数据填充；2) 模态不变提示解耦模块，将共享提示分解为模态特定私有提示，捕捉内在局部相关性；3) 动态提示加权模块，从交叉注意力输出计算互信息权重，自适应抑制缺失模态干扰；4) 多级提示动态连接模块，通过残差连接整合共享提示与自注意力输出，利用全局提示先验强化关键引导特征。
AI.result: 在CMU MOSI、CMU MOSEI和CH SIMS三个公开基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，证明了该框架在多种缺失模态设置下达到了最先进的性能并保持了稳定的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过引入缺失模态评估机制和创新的提示学习方法，有效解决了多模态情感分析中的缺失模态问题，为实际应用场景中的鲁棒多模态理解提供了新的解决方案。

title: Experience Transfer for Multimodal LLM Agents in Minecraft Game
summary: Multimodal LLM agents operating in complex game environments must continually reuse past experience to solve new tasks efficiently. In this work, we propose Echo, a transfer-oriented memory framework that enables agents to derive actionable knowledge from prior interactions rather than treating memory as a passive repository of static records. To make transfer explicit, Echo decomposes reusable knowledge into five dimensions: structure, attribute, process, function, and interaction. This formulation allows the agent to identify recurring patterns shared across different tasks and infer what prior experience remains applicable in new situations. Building on this formulation, Echo leverages In-Context Analogy Learning (ICAL) to retrieve relevant experiences and adapt them to unseen tasks through contextual examples. Experiments in Minecraft show that, under a from-scratch learning setting, Echo achieves a 1.3x to 1.7x speed-up on object-unlocking tasks. Moreover, Echo exhibits a burst-like chain-unlocking phenomenon, rapidly unlocking multiple similar items within a short time interval after acquiring transferable experience. These results suggest that experience transfer is a promising direction for improving the efficiency and adaptability of multimodal LLM agents in complex interactive environments.

AI.tldr: 提出Echo框架，通过将可复用知识分解为五维结构并利用上下文类比学习(ICAL)，使多模态LLM智能体能够从过去交互中提取可操作知识。在Minecraft实验中实现了1.3-1.7倍的加速，并观察到链式解锁现象。
AI.motivation: 多模态LLM智能体在复杂游戏环境中需要不断重用过去的经验来高效解决新任务。当前方法通常将记忆视为静态记录的被动存储库，而非主动转移可操作知识。
AI.method: 提出Echo框架，一个转移导向的记忆系统。将可复用知识分解为五个维度：结构、结构、过程、功能和交互。利用上下文类比学习(ICAL)通过情境示例检索相关经验并使其适应新任务。
AI.result: 在Minecraft环境中的从零学习设置下，Echo在对象解锁任务上实现了1.3x到1.7x的加速。此外，Echo展现出爆发式链式解锁现象，在获得可转移经验后能在短时间内快速解锁多个相似物品。
AI.conclusion: 经验转移是提高复杂交互环境中多模态LLM智能体效率和适应性的一个有前景的方向。

title: SignalClaw: LLM-Guided Evolutionary Synthesis of Interpretable Traffic Signal Control Skills
summary: Traffic signal control TSC requires strategies that are both effective and interpretable for deployment, yet reinforcement learning produces opaque neural policies while program synthesis depends on restrictive domain-specific languages. We present SIGNALCLAW, a framework that uses large language models LLMs as evolutionary skill generators to synthesize and refine interpretable control skills for adaptive TSC. Each skill includes rationale, selection guidance, and executable code, making policies human-inspectable and self-documenting. At each generation, evolution signals from simulation metrics such as queue percentiles, delay trends, and stagnation are translated into natural language feedback to guide improvement. SignalClaw also introduces event-driven compositional evolution: an event detector identifies emergency vehicles, transit priority, incidents, and congestion via TraCI, and a priority dispatcher selects specialized skills. Each skill is evolved independently, and a priority chain enables runtime composition without retraining. We evaluate SignalClaw on routine and event-injected SUMO scenarios against four baselines. On routine scenarios, it achieves average delay of 7.8 to 9.2 seconds, within 3 to 10 percent of the best method, with low variance across random seeds. Under event scenarios, it yields the lowest emergency delay 11.2 to 18.5 seconds versus 42.3 to 72.3 for MaxPressure and 78.5 to 95.3 for DQN, and the lowest transit person delay 9.8 to 11.5 seconds versus 38.7 to 45.2 for MaxPressure. In mixed events, the dispatcher composes skills effectively while maintaining stable overall delay. The evolved skills progress from simple linear rules to conditional strategies with multi-feature interactions, while remaining fully interpretable and directly modifiable by traffic engineers.

AI.tldr: SIGNALCLAW是一种利用大语言模型(LLM)作为进化技能生成器,为自适应交通信号控制合成可解释控制技能的框架。该框架通过模拟器的指标反馈引导LLM改进技能,并引入事件驱动的组合进化机制。
AI.motivation: 当前交通信号控制面临两难选择:强化学习方法产生不透明的黑箱策略,而程序合成依赖于限制性的领域特定语言。实际部署需要既有效又可解释的策略,以便交通工程师理解和修改。
AI.method: 提出SIGNALCLAW框架,核心创新包括:(1)使用LLM作为进化技能生成器,每个技能包含理论依据、选择指导和可执行代码;(2)将仿真指标(队列百分位、延迟趋势、停滞情况)转化为自然语言反馈指导改进;(3)引入事件驱动组合进化:事件检测器识别紧急车辆、公交优先、事故和拥堵,优先调度器选择专门技能;(4)技能独立进化,优先链支持运行时组合无需重训练。
AI.result: 在SUMO场景评估中:(1)常规场景平均延迟7.8-9.2秒,最佳方法的3-10%范围内;(2)事件场景中紧急延迟11.2-18.5秒(MaxPressure为42.3-72.3秒,DQN为78.5-95.3秒);(3)公交人员延迟9.8-11.5秒(MaxPressure为38.7-45.2秒);(4)混合事件中调度器有效组合技能,保持稳定延迟。进化技能从简单线性规则发展为带多特征交互的条件策略,同时保持完全可解释性。
AI.conclusion: SIGNALCLAW成功实现了有效且可解释的交通信号控制,通过LLM驱动的进化策略合成和事件驱动的组合机制,在各种场景下达到或接近最佳性能,同时产生的技能完全可解释且可直接修改,为交通工程实践提供了实用工具。

title: A canonical generalization of OBDD
summary: We introduce Tree Decision Diagrams (TDD) as a model for Boolean functions that generalizes OBDD. They can be seen as a restriction of structured d-DNNF; that is, d-DNNF that respect a vtree $T$. We show that TDDs enjoy the same tractability properties as OBDD, such as model counting, enumeration, conditioning, and apply, and are more succinct. In particular, we show that CNF formulas of treewidth $k$ can be represented by TDDs of FPT size, which is known to be impossible for OBDD. We study the complexity of compiling CNF formulas into deterministic TDDs via bottom-up compilation and relate the complexity of this approach with the notion of factor width introduced by Bova and Szeider.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了树决策图(TDD)作为布尔函数的表示模型，它是OBDD的泛化，可以看作尊重vtree T的结构化d-DNNF的受限形式。TDD继承了OBDD的可计算性质（如模型计数、枚举、限定、apply操作），同时更加紧凑。特别地，树宽为k的CNF公式可以用FPT大小的TDD表示，而这对OBDD是不可能的。本文还研究了通过自底向上编译将CNF公式编译为确定性TDD的复杂度，并将其与Bova和Szeider引入的因子宽度概念联系起来。
AI.motivation: OBDD是布尔函数的重要表示模型，但在表示某些CNF公式时存在succinctness限制。本文旨在提出一个既保留OBDD tractability性质又比OBDD更紧凑的模型，以解决OBDD无法高效表示树宽较高的CNF公式的问题。
AI.method: 1. 将TDD定义为尊重vtree T的结构化d-DNNF的受限形式；2. 证明TDD具有与OBDD相同的可计算性质（model counting、enumeration、conditioning、apply）；3. 证明树宽为k的CNF公式可用FPT大小的TDD表示；4. 研究自底向上编译方法的复杂度并与因子宽度建立联系。
AI.result: TDD继承了OBDD的所有tractability性质，同时比OBDD更加succinct。关键结果是：树宽k的CNF公式可表示为FPT大小的TDD，这打破了OBDD的已知限制。自底向上编译的复杂度与因子宽度密切相关。
AI.conclusion: TDD是一个有价值的布尔函数表示模型，它成功地在保持OBDD可计算性质的同时实现了更好的succinctness，为处理高树宽CNF公式提供了新的思路。

title: Purify-then-Align: Towards Robust Human Sensing under Modality Missing with Knowledge Distillation from Noisy Multimodal Teacher
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026 Workshop On Any-to-Any Multimodal Learning
summary: Robust multimodal human sensing must overcome the critical challenge of missing modalities. Two principal barriers are the Representation Gap between heterogeneous data and the Contamination Effect from low-quality modalities. These barriers are causally linked, as the corruption introduced by contamination fundamentally impedes the reduction of representation disparities. In this paper, we propose PTA, a novel "Purify-then-Align" framework that solves this causal dependency through a synergistic integration of meta-learning and knowledge diffusion. To purify the knowledge source, PTA first employs a meta-learning-driven weighting mechanism that dynamically learns to down-weight the influence of noisy, low-contributing modalities. Subsequently, to align different modalities, PTA introduces a diffusion-based knowledge distillation paradigm in which an information-rich clean teacher, formed from this purified consensus, refines the features of each student modality. The ultimate payoff of this "Purify-then-Align" strategy is the creation of exceptionally powerful single-modality encoders imbued with cross-modal knowledge. Comprehensive experiments on the large-scale MM-Fi and XRF55 datasets, under pronounced Representation Gap and Contamination Effect, demonstrate that PTA achieves state-of-the-art performance and significantly improves the robustness of single-modality models in diverse missing-modality scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出PTA框架，通过"先净化后对齐"策略解决多模态人体感知中缺失模态的挑战。
AI.motivation: 多模态人体感知面临两个关键挑战：异构数据之间的表示差距，以及低质量模态造成的污染效应。这两个障碍存在因果关联，污染引入的腐败从根本上阻碍了表示差距的缩小。
AI.method: PTA框架结合元学习和知识迁移：1) 使用元学习驱动的权重机制动态降低噪声和低贡献模态的影响；2) 引入基于扩散的知识蒸馏范式，由净化后的共识形成信息丰富的干净教师，来精炼每个学生模态的特征。

AI.conclusion: "先净化后对齐"策略成功创建了具有跨模态知识的强大单模态编码器，有效解决了表示差距和污染效应的因果依赖问题。

title: BPC-Net: Annotation-Free Skin Lesion Segmentation via Boundary Probability Calibration
summary: Annotation-free skin lesion segmentation is attractive for low-resource dermoscopic deployment. However, its performance remains constrained by three coupled challenges: noisy pseudo-label supervision, unstable transfer under limited target-domain data, and boundary probability under-confidence. Most existing annotation-free methods primarily focus on pseudo-label denoising. In contrast, the effect of compressed boundary probabilities on final mask quality has received less explicit attention, although it directly affects contour completeness and cannot be adequately corrected by global threshold adjustment alone. To address this issue, we propose BPC-Net, a boundary probability calibration framework for annotation-free skin lesion segmentation. The core of the framework is Gaussian Probability Smoothing (GPS), which performs localized probability-space calibration before thresholding to recover under-confident lesion boundaries without inducing indiscriminate foreground expansion. To support this calibration under noisy pseudo-supervision and cross-domain transfer, we further incorporate two auxiliary designs: a feature-decoupled decoder that separately handles context suppression, detail recovery, and boundary refinement, and an interaction-branch adaptation strategy that updates only the pseudo-label interaction branch while preserving the deployed image-only segmentation path. Under a strictly annotation-free protocol, no manual masks are used during training or target-domain adaptation, and validation labels, when available, are used only for final operating-point selection. Experiments on ISIC-2017, ISIC-2018, and PH2 show that the proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance among published unsupervised methods, reaching a macro-average Dice coefficient and Jaccard index of 85.80\% and 76.97\%, respectively, while approaching supervised reference performance on PH2.

AI.tldr: BPC-Net是一种无需标注的皮肤病变分割框架，通过高斯概率平滑(GPS)进行局部概率空间校准，解决边界概率低估问题
AI.motivation: 现有无需标注方法性能受三方面制约：伪标签噪声监督、有限目标域数据下的不稳定迁移、边界概率低估。边界概率低估直接影响轮廓完整性，全局阈值调整无法有效纠正
AI.method: 提出BPC-Net边界概率校准框架，核心为高斯概率平滑(GPS)，在阈值化前进行局部概率空间校准恢复欠置信的病变边界。包含两个辅助设计：特征解耦解码器分别处理上下文抑制、细节恢复和边界精炼；交互分支适应策略仅更新伪标签交互分支，保留部署的纯图像分割路径
AI.result: 在ISIC-2017、ISIC-2018和PH2数据集上，无需标注协议下达到最新性能，宏平均Dice系数85.80%、Jaccard指数76.97%，在PH2上接近有监督参考性能
AI.conclusion: BPC-Net通过边界概率校准有效提升了无标注皮肤病变分割的性能，为低资源场景下的皮肤病学部署提供了有价值的解决方案

title: ID-Selection: Importance-Diversity Based Visual Token Selection for Efficient LVLM Inference
summary: Recent advances have explored visual token pruning to accelerate the inference of large vision-language models (LVLMs). However, existing methods often struggle to balance token importance and diversity: importance-based methods tend to retain redundant tokens, whereas diversity-based methods may overlook informative ones. This trade-off becomes especially problematic under high reduction ratios, where preserving only a small subset of visual tokens is critical. To address this issue, we propose ID-Selection, a simple yet effective token selection strategy for efficient LVLM inference. The key idea is to couple importance estimation with diversity-aware iterative selection: each token is first assigned an importance score, after which high-scoring tokens are selected one by one while the scores of similar tokens are progressively suppressed. In this way, ID-Selection preserves informative tokens while reducing redundancy in a unified selection process. Extensive experiments across 5 LVLM backbones and 16 main benchmarks demonstrate that ID-Selection consistently achieves superior performance and efficiency, especially under extreme pruning ratios. For example, on LLaVA-1.5-7B, ID-Selection prunes 97.2% of visual tokens, retaining only 16 tokens, while reducing inference FLOPs by over 97% and preserving 91.8% of the original performance, all without additional training.

AI.tldr: ID-Selection是一种简单而有效的视觉token选择策略，用于加速大型视觉-语言模型推理。该方法将重要性估计与多样性感知迭代选择相结合，在保持重要信息的同时减少冗余。在5个LVLM backbone和16个基准测试上取得了优异的性能，特别是在极端剪枝比例下表现突出。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉token剪枝方法难以平衡token重要性和多样性：基于重要性保留的方法倾向于保留冗余token，而基于多样性的方法可能忽略重要信息。这种权衡在高剪枝比例下尤其成问题。ID-Selection旨在解决这一权衡问题。
AI.method: ID-Selection的核心思想是将重要性估计与多样性感知迭代选择耦合：首先为每个token分配重要性分数，然后逐个选择高分token，同时逐步抑制相似token的分数。通过这种方式，ID-Selection在统一的选择过程中保留信息性token同时减少冗余。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B上，ID-Selection剪枝了97.2%的视觉token，仅保留16个token，同时减少超过97%的推理FLOPs，并保持91.8%的原始性能，且无需额外训练。
AI.conclusion: ID-Selection在5个LVLM backbone和16个主要基准测试中一致实现卓越的性能和效率，特别在极端剪枝比例下表现优异。

title: Label Effects: Shared Heuristic Reliance in Trust Assessment by Humans and LLM-as-a-Judge
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as automated evaluators (LLM-as-a-Judge). This work challenges its reliability by showing that trust judgments by LLMs are biased by disclosed source labels. Using a counterfactual design, we find that both humans and LLM judges assign higher trust to information labeled as human-authored than to the same content labeled as AI-generated. Eye-tracking data reveal that humans rely heavily on source labels as heuristic cues for judgments. We analyze LLM internal states during judgment. Across label conditions, models allocate denser attention to the label region than the content region, and this label dominance is stronger under Human labels than AI labels, consistent with the human gaze patterns. Besides, decision uncertainty measured by logits is higher under AI labels than Human labels. These results indicate that the source label is a salient heuristic cue for both humans and LLMs. It raises validity concerns for label-sensitive LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation, and we cautiously raise that aligning models with human preferences may propagate human heuristic reliance into models, motivating debiased evaluation and alignment.

AI.tldr: 研究挑战了LLM作为自动评估器的可靠性,揭示了LLM存在"来源标签偏见"——对人类撰写的标签信任度高于AI生成的标签。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM被广泛用作自动评估器(LLM-as-a-Judge),需要验证其评估结果的可靠性和公正性。之前研究较少关注LLM评估器是否会受到信息来源标签的偏见影响。
AI.method: 采用反事实设计,将相同内容分别标记为"人类撰写"和"AI生成",比较人类和LLM评估器的判断差异;同时使用眼动追踪和LLM内部状态分析(注意力分布、logits不确定性)进行验证。
AI.result: 1)人类和LLM评估器都对人类撰写的标签信任度更高;2)眼动数据显示人类依赖来源标签作为判断启发式线索;3)LLM在标签区域的注意力密度高于内容区域,且"人类"标签下更明显,与人类 gaze模式一致;4)AI标签下的决策不确定性高于人类标签。
AI.conclusion: 来源标签是人和LLM评估器共同的显著性启发式线索,这对标签敏感的LLM-as-a-Judge评估提出有效性担忧。模型与人类偏好对齐可能将人类的启发式依赖传播到模型中,需要去偏见评估和对齐。

The methods (attention analysis, eye-tracking) are also unrelated to 3D motion generation pipelines.

title: Evaluation of Randomization through Style Transfer for Enhanced Domain Generalization
summary: Deep learning models for computer vision often suffer from poor generalization when deployed in real-world settings, especially when trained on synthetic data due to the well-known Sim2Real gap. Despite the growing popularity of style transfer as a data augmentation strategy for domain generalization, the literature contains unresolved contradictions regarding three key design axes: the diversity of the style pool, the role of texture complexity, and the choice of style source. We present a systematic empirical study that isolates and evaluates each of these factors for driving scene understanding, resolving inconsistencies in prior work. Our findings show that (i) expanding the style pool yields larger gains than repeated augmentation with few styles, (ii) texture complexity has no significant effect when the pool is sufficiently large, and (iii) diverse artistic styles outperform domain-aligned alternatives. Guided by these insights, we derive StyleMixDG (Style-Mixing for Domain Generalization), a lightweight, model-agnostic augmentation recipe that requires no architectural modifications or additional losses. Evaluated on the GTAV $\rightarrow$ {BDD100k, Cityscapes, Mapillary Vistas} benchmark, StyleMixDG demonstrates consistent improvements over strong baselines, confirming that the empirically identified design principles translate into practical gains. The code will be released on GitHub.

AI.tldr: 关于风格迁移用于域泛化的系统性实证研究，提出StyleMixDG方法解决Sim2Real差距
AI.motivation: 文献中存在三个关键设计轴的矛盾：风格池多样性、纹理复杂性、风格源选择，缺乏系统性验证
AI.method: 通过控制变量法系统性评估三个设计轴：(i)扩展风格池大小 (ii)纹理复杂性测试 (iii)比较不同风格源（艺术风格 vs 域对齐风格）
AI.result: (i)扩展风格池比重复使用少量风格增益更大 (ii)纹理复杂性在池足够大时无显著影响 (iii)多样化艺术风格优于域对齐替代方案
AI.conclusion: StyleMixDG是轻量级、模型无关的增强方案，在GTAV→{BDD100k, Cityscapes, Mapillary Vistas}基准上优于强基线，验证了经验设计原则的实用性

title: Beyond Behavior: Why AI Evaluation Needs a Cognitive Revolution
summary: In 1950, Alan Turing proposed replacing the question "Can machines think?" with a behavioral test: if a machine's outputs are indistinguishable from those of a thinking being, the question of whether it truly thinks can be set aside. This paper argues that Turing's move was not only a pragmatic simplification but also an epistemological commitment, a decision about what kind of evidence counts as relevant to intelligence attribution, and that this commitment has quietly constrained AI research for seven decades. We trace how Turing's behavioral epistemology became embedded in the field's evaluative infrastructure, rendering unaskable a class of questions about process, mechanism, and internal organization that cognitive psychology, neuroscience, and related disciplines learned to ask. We draw a structural parallel to the behaviorist-to-cognitivist transition in psychology: just as psychology's commitment to studying only observable behavior prevented it from asking productive questions about internal mental processes until that commitment was abandoned, AI's commitment to behavioral evaluation prevents it from distinguishing between systems that achieve identical outputs through fundamentally different computational processes, a distinction on which intelligence attribution depends. We argue that the field requires an epistemological transition comparable to the cognitive revolution: not an abandonment of behavioral evidence, but a recognition that behavioral evidence alone is insufficient for the construct claims the field wishes to make. We articulate what a post-behaviorist epistemology for AI would involve and identify the specific questions it would make askable that the field currently has no way to ask.

AI.tldr: 本文 arguing that Turing's behavioral test (the Turing Test) created an epistemological commitment in AI that limited the field by only considering behavioral outputs as evidence for intelligence, similar to how behaviorism limited psychology. The paper calls for a "post-behaviorist" revolution in AI that would allow researchers to ask questions about internal processes and mechanisms, not just outputs.
AI.motivation: The authors are motivated by a concern that AI research has been constrained for 70 years by Turing's behavioral epistemology - this commitment to only behavioral evidence prevents the field from distinguishing between systems that produce identical outputs through different computational processes. They see a parallel to psychology's behaviorist era which was overcome by the cognitive revolution.
AI.method: The paper uses philosophical analysis and historical comparison - tracing how Turing's test became embedded in AI's evaluative infrastructure, drawing structural parallels to the behaviorist-to-cognitivist transition in psychology, and articulating what questions a post-behaviorist AI epistemology would make askable.
AI.result: The result is a philosophical argument establishing that: (1) Turing's move was an epistemological commitment rather than just a pragmatic simplification; (2) this commitment has constrained AI research by rendering unaskable questions about process and mechanism; (3) AI needs an epistemological transition similar to psychology's cognitive revolution; (4) articulation of specific questions this new epistemology would enable the field to ask.
AI.conclusion: The conclusion proposes that AI requires a post-behaviorist epistemology that doesn't abandon behavioral evidence but recognizes it alone is insufficient for intelligence attribution. This would allow the field to distinguish between systems achieving identical outputs through fundamentally different computational processes - a distinction essential to intelligence but currently impossible under pure behavioral evaluation.

relevance_reason: This paper is about philosophy of AI and AI evaluation methodology (Turing test, behaviorism), not computer graphics or 3D human motion generation. The application domain is completely different - it's a philosophical/philosophy-of-AI paper discussing epistemological foundations, while the research profile is about technical methods for 2D video to 3D motion generation. No overlap in methods, domain, or application area whatsoever.

title: Semantic-Topological Graph Reasoning for Language-Guided Pulmonary Screening
summary: Medical image segmentation driven by free-text clinical instructions is a critical frontier in computer-aided diagnosis. However, existing multimodal and foundation models struggle with the semantic ambiguity of clinical reports and fail to disambiguate complex anatomical overlaps in low-contrast scans. Furthermore, fully fine-tuning these massive architectures on limited medical datasets invariably leads to severe overfitting. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Semantic-Topological Graph Reasoning (STGR) framework for language-guided pulmonary screening. Our approach elegantly synergizes the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLaMA-3-V) with the zero-shot delineation of vision foundation models (MedSAM). Specifically, we introduce a Text-to-Vision Intent Distillation (TVID) module to extract precise diagnostic guidance. To resolve anatomical ambiguity, we formulate mask selection as a dynamic graph reasoning problem, where candidate lesions are modeled as nodes and edges capture spatial and semantic affinities. To ensure deployment feasibility, we introduce a Selective Asymmetric Fine-Tuning (SAFT) strategy that updates less than 1% of the parameters. Rigorous 5-fold cross-validation on the LIDC-IDRI and LNDb datasets demonstrates that our framework establishes a new state-of-the-art. Notably, it achieves an 81.5% Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) on LIDC-IDRI, outperforming leading LLM-based tools like LISA by over 5%. Crucially, our SAFT strategy acts as a powerful regularizer, yielding exceptional cross-fold stability (0.6% DSC variance) and paving the way for robust, context-aware clinical deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合大语言模型LLaMA-3-V与视觉基础模型MedSAM的语义拓扑图推理框架(STGR)，用于语言引导的肺结节筛查分割。该框架通过文本-视觉意图蒸馏模块提取诊断指导，将掩码选择建模为动态图推理问题，并采用选择性非对称微调策略(SAFT)仅更新不到1%的参数即可实现81.5%的Dice相似系数。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分割方法面临两大挑战：1) 临床报告的自由文本指令存在语义歧义，多模态和基础模型难以理解；2) 低对比度扫描中解剖结构重叠复杂导致分割困难；3) 对大规模模型进行完全微调在有限医学数据上会导致严重过拟合问题。
AI.method: 提出STGR框架包含三个核心组件：1) Text-to-Vision Intent Distillation (TVID)模块：从临床文本中提取精确诊断指导，桥接语言模型与视觉模型；2) 动态图推理模块：将候选病变建模为图节点，边捕捉空间和语义亲和性，解决解剖歧义；3) Selective Asymmetric Fine-Tuning (SAFT)策略：仅更新不到1%的参数，降低过拟合风险。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI和LNDb数据集上进行5折交叉验证，STGR在LIDC-IDRI上达到81.5%的Dice相似系数(DSC)，相比当前领先的LLM基工具LISA提升超过5%。SAFT策略作为强大正则化器，交叉折叠稳定性极高， DSC方差仅为0.6%。
AI.conclusion: STGR框架建立了新的state-of-the-art性能，在肺结节分割任务上显著超越现有方法。SAFT策略有效解决了有限医学数据上的过拟合难题，实现了出色的跨折叠稳定性(0.6%方差)，为稳健的上下文感知临床部署铺平了道路。

title: PECKER: A Precisely Efficient Critical Knowledge Erasure Recipe For Machine Unlearning in Diffusion Models
summary: Machine unlearning (MU) has become a critical technique for GenAI models' safe and compliant operation. While existing MU methods are effective, most impose prohibitive training time and computational overhead. Our analysis suggests the root cause lies in poorly directed gradient updates, which reduce training efficiency and destabilize convergence. To mitigate these issues, we propose PECKER, an efficient MU approach that matches or outperforms prevailing methods. Within a distillation framework, PECKER introduces a saliency mask to prioritize updates to parameters that contribute most to forgetting the targeted data, thereby reducing unnecessary gradient computation and shortening overall training time without sacrificing unlearning efficacy. Our method generates samples that unlearn related class or concept more quickly, while closely aligning with the true image distribution on CIFAR-10 and STL-10 datasets, achieving shorter training times for both class forgetting and concept forgetting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PECKER，一种高效的机器遗忘(MU)方法，通过引入显著性掩码在蒸馏框架中优先更新对遗忘目标数据贡献最大的参数，从而减少不必要的梯度计算，缩短训练时间。
AI.motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法虽然有效，但训练时间长且计算开销大。分析表明根本原因在于梯度更新方向不当，导致训练效率降低和收敛不稳定。
AI.method: 在蒸馏框架中引入显著性掩码，优先更新对目标数据遗忘贡献最大的参数，减少不必要的梯度计算。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和STL-10数据集上实现了更短的类遗忘和概念遗忘训练时间，同时保持或优于现有方法的遗忘效果，与真实图像分布紧密对齐。
AI.conclusion: PECKER通过显著性掩码策略有效解决了机器遗忘的计算效率问题，在保持遗忘效果的同时显著缩短了训练时间。

The methods and goals are orthogonal: the paper addresses efficient "forgetting" of learned concepts in diffusion models, not video generation or 2D-to-3D motion reconstruction.

title: FunRec: Reconstructing Functional 3D Scenes from Egocentric Interaction Videos
summary: We present FunRec, a method for reconstructing functional 3D digital twins of indoor scenes directly from egocentric RGB-D interaction videos. Unlike existing methods on articulated reconstruction, which rely on controlled setups, multi-state captures, or CAD priors, FunRec operates directly on in-the-wild human interaction sequences to recover interactable 3D scenes. It automatically discovers articulated parts, estimates their kinematic parameters, tracks their 3D motion, and reconstructs static and moving geometry in canonical space, yielding simulation-compatible meshes. Across new real and simulated benchmarks, FunRec surpasses prior work by a large margin, achieving up to +50 mIoU improvement in part segmentation, 5-10 times lower articulation and pose errors, and significantly higher reconstruction accuracy. We further demonstrate applications on URDF/USD export for simulation, hand-guided affordance mapping and robot-scene interaction.

AI.tldr: FunRec是一种从第一人称RGB-D交互视频直接重建室内场景功能性3D数字孪生的方法，无需 CAD 先验或多状态捕捉，可自动发现铰接部件、估计运动参数、跟踪3D运动并重建仿真兼容网格。
AI.motivation: 现有铰接体重建方法依赖受控环境、多状态捕捉或CAD先验，无法直接从野外人类交互视频中恢复可交互的3D场景。
AI.method: FunRec直接从野外 egocentric RGB-D 交互序列操作，自动发现铰接部件、估计运动参数、跟踪3D运动，在规范空间中重建静态和动态几何，生成仿真兼容网格。
AI.result: 在真实和模拟 benchmark 上，相比现有方法提升高达 +50 mIoU 的部件分割精度，铰接和姿态误差降低 5-10 倍，重建精度显著提高。
AI.conclusion: FunRec 实现了从单目交互视频直接重建功能性3D场景的突破，可导出 URDF/USD 用于仿真，支持手势引导的affordance映射和机器人-场景交互，具有重要应用价值。

While both deal with 2D-to-3D reconstruction, the application domains are fundamentally different - scene/object reconstruction vs. human body motion generation. The paper focuses on discovering articulated parts and tracking object motion in environments, not human motion or pose recovery. title: CuraLight: Debate-Guided Data Curation for LLM-Centered Traffic Signal Control
summary:
Traffic signal control (TSC) is a core component of intelligent transportation systems (ITS), aiming to reduce congestion, emissions, and travel time. Recent approaches based on reinforcement learning (RL) and large language models (LLMs) have improved adaptivity, but still suffer from limited interpretability, insufficient interaction data, and weak generalization to heterogeneous intersections.
  This paper proposes CuraLight, an LLM-centered framework where an RL agent assists the fine-tuning of an LLM-based traffic signal controller. The RL agent explores traffic environments and generates high-quality interaction trajectories, which are converted into prompt-response pairs for imitation fine-tuning. A multi-LLM ensemble deliberation system further evaluates candidate signal timing actions through structured debate, providing preference-aware supervision signals for training.
  Experiments conducted in SUMO across heterogeneous real-world networks from Jinan, Hangzhou, and Yizhuang demonstrate that CuraLight consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, reducing average travel time by 5.34 percent, average queue length by 5.14 percent, and average waiting time by 7.02 percent. The results highlight the effectiveness of combining RL-assisted exploration with deliberation-based data curation for scalable and interpretable traffic signal control.

AI.tldr: CuraLight是一个LLM中心的交通信号控制框架，利用RL agent辅助探索生成高质量交互数据，并通过多LLM ensemble deliberation系统提供偏好感知监督，实现可扩展可解释的交通信号控制。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习(RL)和大语言模型(LLM)的交通信号控制方法仍存在可解释性有限、交互数据不足、对异构交叉口泛化能力弱等问题。
AI.method: 提出CuraLight框架，包含：1）RL agent探索交通环境并生成高质量交互轨迹，转换为prompt-response对用于模仿微调；2）多LLM ensemble deliberation系统通过结构化辩论评估候选信号时序动作，提供偏好感知监督信号用于训练。
AI.result: 在SUMO上基于济南、杭州、亦庄的真实异构路网进行实验，CuraLight相比SOTA基线方法，平均旅行时间降低5.34%，平均排队长度降低5.14%，平均等待时间降低7.02%。
AI.conclusion: CuraLight通过结合RL辅助探索与基于 deliberation 的数据筛选，实现了大规可扩展且可解释的交通信号控制。实验表明该方法在真实异构城市场景中显著优于现有基线方法。

The application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. The methods (LLM, RL) are used in a completely unrelated domain (smart city/traffic engineering) rather than computer graphics or motion generation.

title: DetailVerifyBench: A Benchmark for Dense Hallucination Localization in Long Image Captions
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. The dataset and code are available at https://zyx-hhnkh.github.io/DetailVerifyBench/
summary: Accurately detecting and localizing hallucinations is a critical task for ensuring high reliability of image captions. In the era of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), captions have evolved from brief sentences into comprehensive narratives, often spanning hundreds of words. This shift exponentially increases the challenge: models must now pinpoint specific erroneous spans or words within extensive contexts, rather than merely flag response-level inconsistencies. However, existing benchmarks lack the fine granularity and domain diversity required to evaluate this capability. To bridge this gap, we introduce DetailVerifyBench, a rigorous benchmark comprising 1,000 high-quality images across five distinct domains. With an average caption length of over 200 words and dense, token-level annotations of multiple hallucination types, it stands as the most challenging benchmark for precise hallucination localization in the field of long image captioning to date. Our benchmark is available at https://zyx-hhnkh.github.io/DetailVerifyBench/.

AI.tldr: DetailVerifyBench是一个严格的基准测试，用于评估长图像caption中幻觉的精确检测与定位，包含1000张高质量图像，涵盖5个不同领域，平均caption长度超过200词，提供细粒度的token-level注释。
AI.motivation: 准确检测和定位幻觉对于确保图像caption的高可靠性至关重要。在多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)时代，caption从简短句子演变为全面叙事，通常达数百词。这一转变极大增加了挑战：模型需要在广泛上下文中精确定位特定错误spans或words，而非仅标记响应级的不一致。现有基准缺乏细粒度和领域多样性。
AI.method: 引入DetailVerifyBench，一个包含1000张高质量图像的严格基准测试，涵盖5个不同领域。平均caption长度超过200词，采用密集的、token级别的多种幻觉类型标注。
AI.result: 这是迄今为止长图像caption领域最精确的幻觉定位基准测试。
AI.conclusion: DetailVerifyBench为评估细粒度幻觉定位能力提供了最严格的基准，可用于推动图像caption质量评估领域的发展。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about hallucination detection in image captions (NLP/Computer Vision domain), not 3D Human Motion Generation. While it mentions VLMs for quality assessment, it's completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on 2D video-to-3D motion reconstruction, diffusion-based motion generation, and temporal consistency - none of which are addressed by this paper about evaluating long image captions for hallucination errors.

title: A Unified Foundation Model for All-in-One Multi-Modal Remote Sensing Image Restoration and Fusion with Language Prompting
summary: Remote sensing imagery suffers from clouds, haze, noise, resolution limits, and sensor heterogeneity. Existing restoration and fusion approaches train separate models per degradation type. In this work, we present Language-conditioned Large-scale Remote Sensing restoration model (LLaRS), the first unified foundation model for multi-modal and multi-task remote sensing low-level vision. LLaRS employs Sinkhorn-Knopp optimal transport to align heterogeneous bands into semantically matched slots, routes features through three complementary mixture-of-experts layers (convolutional experts for spatial patterns, channel-mixing experts for spectral fidelity, and attention experts with low-rank adapters for global context), and stabilizes joint training via step-level dynamic weight adjustment. To train LLaRS, we construct LLaRS1M, a million-scale multi-task dataset spanning eleven restoration and enhancement tasks, integrating real paired observations and controlled synthetic degradations with diverse natural language prompts. Experiments show LLaRS consistently outperforms seven competitive models, and parameter-efficient finetuning experiments demonstrate strong transfer capability and adaptation efficiency on unseen data. Repo: https://github.com/yc-cui/LLaRS

AI.tldr: LLaRS是首个统一的多模态多任务遥感低层视觉基础模型，通过Sinkhorn-Knopp最优传输对齐异构波段，采用卷积、通道混合和注意力三类混合专家层处理不同特征，并在百万级多任务数据集LLaRS1M上进行训练，在多项任务上超越七个竞争模型。
AI.motivation: 遥感图像受云层、雾霾、噪声、分辨率限制和传感器异构性影响，现有恢复和融合方法针对每种退化类型训练单独的模型，缺乏统一处理多任务多模态遥感图像的基础模型。
AI.method: 1) 使用Sinkhorn-Knopp最优传输将异构波段对齐到语义匹配的槽中；2) 通过三个互补的混合专家层路由特征：卷积专家处理空间模式、通道混合专家处理光谱保真度、带低秩适配器的注意力专家处理全局上下文；3) 通过步级动态权重调整稳定联合训练；4) 在LLaRS1M数据集上训练，该数据集包含100万规模的多任务样本，涵盖11种恢复和增强任务，整合了真实配对观测和受控合成退化，并配有自然语言提示。
AI.result: LLaRS在实验中一致性地超越了七个具有竞争力的模型，参数高效微调实验证明了在未见数据上具有强大的迁移能力和适应性。
AI.conclusion: LLaRS是首个用于多模态和多任务遥感低层视觉的统一基础模型，通过Sinkhorn-Knopp最优传输、混合专家层和动态权重调整等技术实现了有效的联合训练。参数高效微调实验表明该模型在未见数据上具有强大的迁移能力和适应性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about remote sensing image restoration and fusion - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / 3D Human Motion Generation. While the paper uses some machine learning techniques (optimal transport, mixed experts, attention mechanisms), the application domain is satellite/remote sensing imagery, not human motion generation, video-to-3D pose recovery, or any computer graphics task. The pain points mentioned (domain gap in 2D-to-3D motion, 3D pose recovery, temporal consistency for human motion) are entirely different from remote sensing image restoration.

title: QA-MoE: Towards a Continuous Reliability Spectrum with Quality-Aware Mixture of Experts for Robust Multimodal Sentiment Analysis
summary: Multimodal Sentiment Analysis (MSA) aims to infer human sentiment from textual, acoustic, and visual signals. In real-world scenarios, however, multimodal inputs are often compromised by dynamic noise or modality missingness. Existing methods typically treat these imperfections as discrete cases or assume fixed corruption ratios, which limits their adaptability to continuously varying reliability conditions. To address this, we first introduce a Continuous Reliability Spectrum to unify missingness and quality degradation into a single framework. Building on this, we propose QA-MoE, a Quality-Aware Mixture-of-Experts framework that quantifies modality reliability via self-supervised aleatoric uncertainty. This mechanism explicitly guides expert routing, enabling the model to suppress error propagation from unreliable signals while preserving task-relevant information. Extensive experiments indicate that QA-MoE achieves competitive or state-of-the-art performance across diverse degradation scenarios and exhibits a promising One-Checkpoint-for-All property in practice.

AI.tldr: 针对多模态情感分析中模态缺失和质量问题，提出连续可靠性光谱统一框架和QA-MoE方法，通过自监督aleatoric不确定性量化模态可靠性并引导专家路由，实现卓越性能。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中多模态输入常受动态噪声或模态缺失影响，现有方法将这些不完美情况视为离散情况或假设固定 corruption ratio，难以适应连续变化的可靠性条件。
AI.method: 提出QA-MoE框架，利用自监督学习的aleatoric不确定性来量化模态可靠性，该机制显式引导专家路由，使模型能够抑制来自不可靠信号的错误传播，同时保留任务相关信息。
AI.result: QA-MoE在多种退化场景下达到竞争性或最先进的性能，并展现出实用的"一键检查点"特性。
AI.conclusion: QA-MoE通过质量感知的专家路由机制有效解决了连续变化可靠性条件下的多模态情感分析问题，具有良好的实用价值。

While both mention "quality assessment," the application domains are entirely different - sentiment analysis vs. 3D human motion generation. No methods in common: no diffusion for video generation, no 2D-to-3D reconstruction, no 3D motion models. This is a fundamental application domain mismatch.

title: SGANet: Semantic and Geometric Alignment for Multimodal Multi-view Anomaly Detection
summary: Multi-view anomaly detection aims to identify surface defects on complex objects using observations captured from multiple viewpoints. However, existing unsupervised methods often suffer from feature inconsistency arising from viewpoint variations and modality discrepancies. To address these challenges, we propose a Semantic and Geometric Alignment Network (SGANet), a unified framework for multimodal multi-view anomaly detection that effectively combines semantic and geometric alignment to learn physically coherent feature representations across viewpoints and modalities. SGANet consists of three key components. The Selective Cross-view Feature Refinement Module (SCFRM) selectively aggregates informative patch features from adjacent views to enhance cross-view feature interaction. The Semantic-Structural Patch Alignment (SSPA) enforces semantic alignment across modalities while maintaining structural consistency under viewpoint transformations. The Multi-View Geometric Alignment (MVGA) further aligns geometrically corresponding patches across viewpoints. By jointly modeling feature interaction, semantic and structural consistency, and global geometric correspondence, SGANet effectively enhances anomaly detection performance in multimodal multi-view settings. Extensive experiments on the SiM3D and Eyecandies datasets demonstrate that SGANet achieves state-of-the-art performance in both anomaly detection and localization, validating its effectiveness in realistic industrial scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出了SGANet，一个用于多模态多视角异常检测的统一框架，通过语义和几何对齐来学习跨视角和模态的物理一致特征表示。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督方法常因视角变化和模态差异导致的特征不一致而受影响，难以有效识别复杂物体上的表面缺陷。
AI.method: 提出选择性跨视角特征细化模块(SCFRM)聚合相邻视图信息；语义-结构 patch对齐(SSPA)保持跨模态语义对齐和视角变换下的结构一致性；多视角几何对齐(MVGA)对齐几何对应patch。
AI.result: 在SiM3D和Eyecandies数据集上实现最先进的异常检测和定位性能。
AI.conclusion: SGANet通过联合建模特征交互、语义结构一致性和全局几何对应，有效提升了多模态多视角场景下的异常检测性能，在实际工业场景中具有有效性。

title: Can Large Language Models Reinvent Foundational Algorithms?
summary: LLMs have shown strong potential to advance scientific discovery. Whether they possess the capacity for foundational innovation, however, remains an open question. In this work, we focus on a prerequisite for foundational innovation: can LLMs reinvent foundational algorithms in computer science? Our \textit{Unlearn-and-Reinvent} pipeline applies LLM unlearning to remove a specific foundational algorithm, such as Dijkstra's or Euclid's algorithm, from an LLM's pretrained knowledge, and then tests whether the model can reinvent it in a controlled environment. To enable effective unlearning, we adopt a GRPO-based, on-policy unlearning method. Across 10 target algorithms, 3 strong open-weight models, and 3 hint levels, our experiments demonstrate that (1) the strongest model Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507 successfully reinvents 50% of the algorithms with no hint, 70% at hint level 1, and 90% at hint level 2; (2) a few high-level hints can enhance the reinvention success rate, but even step-by-step hints fail for those complicated algorithms; and (3) test-time reinforcement learning enables successful reinvention for the Strassen algorithm at hint level 2. Through analyses of output trajectories and ablation studies, we find that generative verifier in the reinvention phase plays a critical role in sustaining models' reasoning strength, helping to avoid the ``thought collapse'' phenomenon. These findings offer insights into both the potential and current limits of LLMs' innovative thinking.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Unlearn-and-Reinvent管道测试LLM的基础创新能力，通过移除特定算法知识后测试重新发明能力，发现最强模型可重新发明50-90%的算法，但复杂算法仍具挑战，生成验证器和测试时强化学习是关键。
AI.motivation: 研究大语言模型是否具备基础创新能力，这是实现基础创新之前提。测试LLM能否在移除算法知识后重新发明计算机科学基础算法。
AI.method: 采用基于GRPO的on-policy unlearning方法移除LLM中特定基础算法知识，然后在受控环境中测试模型能否重新发明该算法；使用生成式验证器避免"思维崩溃"现象；引入测试时强化学习策略。
AI.result: Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507在无提示下成功重新发明50%算法，提示级别1时达70%，提示级别2时达90%；少数高级提示可提高成功率，但复杂算法即使逐步提示也失败；测试时强化学习使Strassen算法在提示级别2下成功重新发明。
AI.conclusion: LLMs具有一定的创新思维能力，能够在移除特定算法知识后重新发明50-90%的算法，但复杂算法即使有逐步提示也难以成功；测试时强化学习可帮助解决复杂算法的重新发明问题；生成验证器在维持模型推理能力方面起关键作用。

title: Towards Athlete Fatigue Assessment from Association Football Videos
summary: Fatigue monitoring is central in association football due to its links with injury risk and tactical performance. However, objective fatigue-related indicators are commonly derived from subjective self-reported metrics, biomarkers derived from laboratory tests, or, more recently, intrusive sensors such as heart monitors or GPS tracking data. This paper studies whether monocular broadcast videos can provide spatio-temporal signals of sufficient quality to support fatigue-oriented analysis. Building on state-of-the-art Game State Reconstruction methods, we extract player trajectories in pitch coordinates and propose a novel kinematics processing algorithm to obtain temporally consistent speed and acceleration estimates from reconstructed tracks. We then construct acceleration--speed (A-S) profiles from these signals and analyze their behavior as fatigue-related performance indicators. We evaluate the full pipeline on the public SoccerNet-GSR benchmark, considering both 30-second clips and a complete 45-minute half to examine short-term reliability and longer-term temporal consistency. Our results indicate that monocular GSR can recover kinematic patterns that are compatible with A-S profiling while also revealing sensitivity to trajectory noise, calibration errors, and temporal discontinuities inherent to broadcast footage. These findings support monocular broadcast video as a low-cost basis for fatigue analysis and delineate the methodological challenges for future research.

AI.tldr: 研究探索将单目广播视频作为足球运动员疲劳监测的低成本工具，基于比赛状态重建方法提取球员轨迹，通过运动学处理算法获取速度加速度估计，构建加速-速度(A-S)轮廓作为疲劳相关性能指标，并在SoccerNet-GSR基准数据集上验证了该方法的可行性。
AI.motivation: 当前足球运动中的疲劳监测主要依赖主观自评指标、实验室生物标志物检测或侵入性传感器（如心率监测器、GPS追踪），这些方法要么不够客观，要么成本高昂且具有侵入性，需要一种更低成本的替代方案。
AI.method: 1. 基于现有的比赛状态重建(GSR)方法从单目广播视频中提取球员在球场坐标系统中的轨迹；2. 提出新型运动学处理算法，从重建的轨迹中获得时间一致的速度和加速度估计；3. 构建加速-速度(A-S)轮廓作为疲劳相关性能指标；4. 在SoccerNet-GSR公开数据集上评估，分别测试30秒片段和45分钟半场的表现以检验短期可靠性和长期时间一致性。
AI.result: 单目GSR能够恢复与A-S轮廓分析兼容的运动模式，但同时揭示了对轨迹噪声、摄像机校准误差和时间不连续性的敏感性。结果支持将单目广播视频作为疲劳分析的低成本基础，并指出了未来研究的方法论挑战。
AI.conclusion: 单目广播视频可用于足球运动员疲劳监测，具有低成本优势；但需解决轨迹噪声、校准误差和时间不连续性带来的挑战，未来研究应着重改进这些问题以提高可靠性。

title: Emergent social transmission of model-based representations without inference
summary: How do people acquire rich, flexible knowledge about their environment from others despite limited cognitive capacity? Humans are often thought to rely on computationally costly mentalizing, such as inferring others' beliefs. In contrast, cultural evolution emphasizes that behavioral transmission can be supported by simple social cues. Using reinforcement learning simulations, we show how minimal social learning can indirectly transmit higher-level representations. We simulate a naïve agent searching for rewards in a reconfigurable environment, learning either alone or by observing an expert - crucially, without inferring mental states. Instead, the learner heuristically selects actions or boosts value representations based on observed actions. Our results demonstrate that these cues bias the learner's experience, causing its representation to converge toward the expert's. Model-based learners benefit most from social exposure, showing faster learning and more expert-like representations. These findings show how cultural transmission can arise from simple, non-mentalizing processes exploiting asocial learning mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 研究通过强化学习模拟证明，简单的社会学习线索（不涉及心智理论推断）可以间接传递更高层次的表征，使学习者表征向专家收敛。
AI.motivation: 人类如何在有限的认知能力下从他人那里获取丰富而灵活的环境知识？传统观点认为人类依赖计算成本较高的心智理论（如推断他人信念），而文化进化观点强调行为传递可以由简单的社会线索支持。
AI.method: 使用强化学习模拟，比较在重新配置环境中单独搜索奖励的 naïve agent 与观察专家学习的 learner；learner 不推断心智状态，而是启发式地选择动作或基于观察到的动作提升价值表征。
AI.result: 这些线索使 learner's 表征向 expert 收敛，基于模型的 learner's 受益最大，表现出更快的学习和更像 expert 的表征。
AI.conclusion: 文化传递可以源自简单的、非心智理论过程，利用非社会学习机制。

title: PanopticQuery: Unified Query-Time Reasoning for 4D Scenes
summary: Understanding dynamic 4D environments through natural language queries requires not only accurate scene reconstruction but also robust semantic grounding across space, time, and viewpoints. While recent methods using neural representations have advanced 4D reconstruction, they remain limited in contextual reasoning, especially for complex semantics such as interactions, temporal actions, and spatial relations. A key challenge lies in transforming noisy, view-dependent predictions into globally consistent 4D interpretations. We introduce PanopticQuery, a framework for unified query-time reasoning in 4D scenes. Our approach builds on 4D Gaussian Splatting for high-fidelity dynamic reconstruction and introduces a multi-view semantic consensus mechanism that grounds natural language queries by aggregating 2D semantic predictions across multiple views and time frames. This process filters inconsistent outputs, enforces geometric consistency, and lifts 2D semantics into structured 4D groundings via neural field optimization. To support evaluation, we present Panoptic-L4D, a new benchmark for language-based querying in dynamic scenes. Experiments demonstrate that PanopticQuery sets a new state of the art on complex language queries, effectively handling attributes, actions, spatial relationships, and multi-object interactions. A video demonstration is available in the supplementary materials.

AI.tldr: PanopticQuery是一种在4D场景中通过自然语言进行统一查询推理的框架，基于4D Gaussian Splatting进行高保真动态重建，并引入多视角语义共识机制将2D语义预测聚合为结构化的4D语义 grounding。提出Panoptic-L4D新基准，在复杂语言查询任务上达到新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有基于神经表示的4D重建方法在上下文推理方面存在局限，难以处理复杂语义（如交互、时序动作、空间关系）。核心挑战在于将噪声大、视角依赖的预测转换为全局一致的4D解读。

AI.conclusion: PanopticQuery通过创新的多视角语义共识机制成功解决了4D场景中自然语言查询的语义 grounding 问题，为动态场景的语义理解提供了新的研究方向。

title: Analogical Reasoning as a Doctor: A Foundation Model for Gastrointestinal Endoscopy Diagnosis
summary: Gastrointestinal diseases impose a growing global health burden, and endoscopy is a primary tool for early diagnosis. However, routine endoscopic image interpretation still suffers from missed lesions and limited efficiency. Although AI-assisted diagnosis has shown promise, existing models often lack generalizability, adaptability, robustness, and scalability because of limited medical data, domain shift, and heterogeneous annotations. To address these challenges, we develop RATNet, a foundation model for gastrointestinal endoscopy imaging based on analogical reasoning. RATNet acquires and transfers knowledge from heterogeneous expert annotations across five gastrointestinal endoscopy datasets through a cyclic pre-training strategy. Its architecture consists of an encoder, a relevance-knowledge acquisition and transfer (RAT) module, a projector, and a multi-task head, and supports fine-tuning, linear probing, and zero-shot transfer. Evaluations show that RATNet outperforms existing foundation models, including GastroNet and GastroVision, across six scenarios: diagnosis of common gastrointestinal diseases, few-shot learning for rare diseases, zero-shot transfer to new medical sites, robustness under long-tailed disease distributions, adaptation to novel diseases, and privacy-preserving deployment via federated learning. Its advantage comes from an analogical reasoning mechanism that matches image-derived posterior knowledge to a learned prior knowledge base and transfers relative knowledge to guide diagnosis, improving generalization and resistance to bias. RATNet is open and cost-effective, supports automatic integration of heterogeneous annotations without manual label unification, and reduces data acquisition costs, making it a practical foundation for intelligent gastrointestinal diagnosis, especially in resource-limited settings.

AI.tldr: RATNet是一个基于类比推理的胃肠内镜成像基础模型，通过周期性预训练策略从五个异构数据集中获取和转移知识，解决了现有模型泛化性、适应性、鲁棒性和可扩展性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 胃肠疾病带来日益增长的全球健康负担，内镜是早期诊断的主要工具，但常规图像解读存在漏诊和效率有限的问题。虽然AI辅助诊断显示前景，但现有模型因医学数据有限、领域偏移和异构注释而缺乏泛化性、适应性、鲁棒性和可扩展性。
AI.method: 开发了RATNet，包含编码器、相关性知识获取和转移(RAT)模块、投影器和多任务头，支持微调、线性探测和零样本迁移。采用循环预训练策略从五个胃肠内镜数据集中获取和转移异构专家知识。核心优势是类比推理机制，将图像后验知识与学习的先验知识库匹配，并转移相关知识指导诊断。
AI.result: RATNet在六个场景中优于现有基础模型(GastroNet和GastroVision)：常见胃肠疾病诊断、罕见疾病少样本学习、新医疗站点零样本迁移、长尾疾病分布下的鲁棒性、新疾病适应性和隐私保护的联邦学习部署。
AI.conclusion: RATNet通过类比推理机制提高泛化性和抗偏倚能力，是智能胃肠诊断的实用基础模型，尤其适合资源有限的场景。它开源且成本效益高，支持异构注释的自动整合，减少数据采集成本。

title: Probing Intrinsic Medical Task Relationships: A Contrastive Learning Perspective
summary: While much of the medical computer vision community has focused on advancing performance for specific tasks, the underlying relationships between tasks, i.e., how they relate, overlap, or differ on a representational level, remain largely unexplored. Our work explores these intrinsic relationships between medical vision tasks, specifically, we investigate 30 tasks, such as semantic tasks (e.g., segmentation and detection), image generative tasks (e.g., denoising, inpainting, or colorization), and image transformation tasks (e.g., geometric transformations). Our goal is to probe whether a data-driven representation space can capture an underlying structure of tasks across a variety of 39 datasets from wildly different medical imaging modalities, including computed tomography, magnetic resonance, electron microscopy, X-ray ultrasound and more. By revealing how tasks relate to one another, we aim to provide insights into their fundamental properties and interconnectedness. To this end, we introduce Task-Contrastive Learning (TaCo), a contrastive learning framework designed to embed tasks into a shared representation space. Through TaCo, we map these heterogeneous tasks from different modalities into a joint space and analyze their properties: identifying which tasks are distinctly represented, which blend together, and how iterative alterations to tasks are reflected in the embedding space. Our work provides a foundation for understanding the intrinsic structure of medical vision tasks, offering a deeper understanding of task similarities and their interconnected properties in embedding spaces.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了医学视觉任务之间的内在关系，通过TaCo对比学习框架将30个任务和39个数据集的异构医学影像任务嵌入到共享表示空间中，揭示了任务的相似性、区分度和互联特性。
AI.motivation: 医学计算机视觉社区大多聚焦于推进特定任务的性能，而任务之间的底层关系（它们如何在表示层面关联、重叠或差异）仍未被充分探索。研究旨在揭示医学视觉任务之间的内在关系，探索30个任务（包括语义任务、图像生成任务和图像转换任务）在39个不同医学影像模态（CT、磁共振、电子显微镜、X射线、超声等）下的潜在结构。
AI.method: 提出Task-Contrastive Learning (TaCo)框架，这是一种对比学习框架，旨在将任务嵌入到共享的表示空间中。通过TaCo将来自不同模态的异构任务映射到联合空间中，分析它们的属性：识别哪些任务被明确表示，哪些任务混合在一起，以及任务的迭代变化如何在嵌入空间中反映。
AI.result: 通过TaCo框架成功将异构任务映射到联合表示空间中，揭示了任务间的相似性和差异性，识别出哪些任务被明确区分、哪些任务相互融合，以及任务迭代变化如何在嵌入空间中体现。为理解医学视觉任务的基本属性和互联性提供了 insights。
AI.conclusion: 研究为理解医学视觉任务的内在结构提供了基础，为理解任务相似性和嵌入空间中的互联特性提供了更深的理解。研究表明数据驱动的表示空间能够捕捉医学视觉任务之间的潜在结构和关系，不同任务在嵌入空间中有的清晰区分，有的相互融合。

authors: Gerrit J. J. van den Burg
title: Vision-Guided Iterative Refinement for Frontend Code Generation
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 Workshop on AI with Recursive Self-Improvement
summary: Code generation with large language models often relies on multi-stage human-in-the-loop refinement, which is effective but very costly - particularly in domains such as frontend web development where the solution quality depends on rendered visual output. We present a fully automated critic-in-the-loop framework in which a vision-language model serves as a visual critic that provides structured feedback on rendered webpages to guide iterative refinement of generated code. Across real-world user requests from the WebDev Arena dataset, this approach yields consistent improvements in solution quality, achieving up to 17.8% increase in performance over three refinement cycles. Next, we investigate parameter-efficient fine-tuning using LoRA to understand whether the improvements provided by the critic can be internalized by the code-generating LLM. Fine-tuning achieves 25% of the gains from the best critic-in-the-loop solution without a significant increase in token counts. Our findings indicate that automated, VLM-based critique of frontend code generation leads to significantly higher quality solutions than can be achieved through a single LLM inference pass, and highlight the importance of iterative refinement for the complex visual outputs associated with web development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种完全自动化的批评者-循环框架，使用视觉语言模型作为视觉批评者为生成的代码提供结构化反馈，指导前端网页开发中生成代码的迭代优化。在WebDev Arena数据集的真实用户请求上，该方法在三个优化周期内实现了高达17.8%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在代码生成中通常依赖多阶段的人工参与优化，这种方法虽然有效但成本高昂，特别是在前端网页开发等领域，因为解决方案质量依赖于渲染的视觉输出。
AI.method: 提出了一种完全自动化的批评者-循环框架，其中视觉语言模型充当视觉批评者，为渲染的网页提供结构化反馈，以指导生成代码的迭代优化。同时研究使用LoRA进行参数高效微调，探讨是否可以将批评者提供的改进内化到代码生成LLM中。
AI.result: 在三个优化周期内实现高达17.8%的性能提升；微调可在不显著增加token数量的情况下实现最佳批评者-循环解决方案25%的增益。
AI.conclusion: 自动化的、基于VLM的前端代码生成批评能够产生比单次LLM推理显著更高质量的解决方案，并突出了迭代优化对网页开发相关复杂视觉输出的重要性。

title: Deep Researcher Agent: An Autonomous Framework for 24/7 Deep Learning Experimentation with Zero-Cost Monitoring
summary: We present \textbf{Deep Researcher Agent}, an open-source framework that enables large language model (LLM) agents to autonomously conduct deep learning experiments around the clock. Unlike existing AI research assistants that focus on paper writing or code generation, our system addresses the full experiment lifecycle: hypothesis formation, code implementation, training execution, result analysis, and iterative refinement. The framework introduces three key innovations: (1) \textbf{Zero-Cost Monitoring} -- a monitoring paradigm that incurs zero LLM API costs during model training by relying solely on process-level checks and log file reads; (2) \textbf{Two-Tier Constant-Size Memory} -- a memory architecture capped at $\sim$5K characters regardless of runtime duration, preventing the unbounded context growth that plagues long-running agents; and (3) \textbf{Minimal-Toolset Leader-Worker Architecture} -- a multi-agent design where each worker agent is equipped with only 3--5 tools, reducing per-call token overhead by up to 73\%. In sustained deployments spanning 30+ days, the framework autonomously completed 500+ experiment cycles across four concurrent research projects, achieving a 52\% improvement over baseline metrics in one project through 200+ automated experiments -- all at an average LLM cost of \$0.08 per 24-hour cycle. Code is available at https://github.com/Xiangyue-Zhang/auto-deep-researcher-24x7.

AI.tldr: Deep Researcher Agent是一个开源框架，使LLM智能体能够全天候自主进行深度学习实验，涵盖假设形成、代码实现、训练执行、结果分析和迭代优化等完整实验生命周期。

AI.result: 在30+天持续部署中，自主完成500+实验循环，跨四个并发研究项目，在一个项目中通过200+自动化实验实现52%的基线指标提升，平均每24小时周期LLM成本仅$0.08。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了低成本、高效率的自主深度学习研究，为LLM智能体在科研实验自动化方面提供了可行方案。

title: 3D Smoke Scene Reconstruction Guided by Vision Priors from Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Reconstructing 3D scenes from smoke-degraded multi-view images is particularly difficult because smoke introduces strong scattering effects, view-dependent appearance changes, and severe degradation of cross-view consistency. To address these issues, we propose a framework that integrates visual priors with efficient 3D scene modeling. We employ Nano-Banana-Pro to enhance smoke-degraded images and provide clearer visual observations for reconstruction and develop Smoke-GS, a medium-aware 3D Gaussian Splatting framework for smoke scene reconstruction and restoration-oriented novel view synthesis. Smoke-GS models the scene using explicit 3D Gaussians and introduces a lightweight view-dependent medium branch to capture direction-dependent appearance variations caused by smoke. Our method preserves the rendering efficiency of 3D Gaussian Splatting while improving robustness to smoke-induced degradation. Results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method for generating consistent and visually clear novel views in challenging smoke environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视觉先验与高效3D场景建模的框架，用于从烟雾退化的多视角图像中重建3D场景。该框架包含Nano-Banana-Pro图像增强模块和Smoke-GS中感知3D高斯溅射模块，能够在具有挑战性的烟雾环境中生成一致且视觉清晰的合成视角。
AI.motivation: 烟雾场景的3D重建面临重大挑战：烟雾引入强烈的散射效应、视角依赖的外观变化，以及跨视角一致性的严重退化。这些问题使得传统多视角三维重建方法难以直接应用于烟雾环境。
AI.method: 1) 使用Nano-Banana-Pro增强烟雾退化图像，提供更清晰的视觉观测；2) 提出Smoke-GS中感知3D高斯溅射框架，采用显式3D高斯建模场景；3) 引入轻量级视角依赖的介质分支，捕捉烟雾导致的方向依赖外观变化；4) 保持3D高斯溅射的渲染效率，同时提高对烟雾退化影响的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在具有挑战性的烟雾环境中能够生成一致且视觉清晰的合成视角，有效解决了烟雾场景重建和面向恢复的新视角合成问题。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功结合了图像增强与3D高斯溅射技术，通过中感知建模有效处理了烟雾散射和视角变化问题，为烟雾场景的高质量3D重建提供了有效解决方案。

title: When Do We Need LLMs? A Diagnostic for Language-Driven Bandits
comment: ICLR 2026 Workshop on AI Advances in Finance
summary: We study Contextual Multi-Armed Bandits (CMABs) for non-episodic sequential decision making problems where the context includes both textual and numerical information (e.g., recommendation systems, dynamic portfolio adjustments, offer selection; all frequent problems in finance). While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to these settings, utilizing LLMs for reasoning at every decision step is computationally expensive and uncertainty estimates are difficult to obtain. To address this, we introduce LLMP-UCB, a bandit algorithm that derives uncertainty estimates from LLMs via repeated inference. However, our experiments demonstrate that lightweight numerical bandits operating on text embeddings (dense or Matryoshka) match or exceed the accuracy of LLM-based solutions at a fraction of their cost. We further show that embedding dimensionality is a practical lever on the exploration-exploitation balance, enabling cost--performance tradeoffs without prompt complexity. Finally, to guide practitioners, we propose a geometric diagnostic based on the arms' embedding to decide when to use LLM-driven reasoning versus a lightweight numerical bandit. Our results provide a principled deployment framework for cost-effective, uncertainty-aware decision systems with broad applicability across AI use cases in financial services.

AI.tldr: 研究针对含文本和数值信息的上下文多臂bandit问题，提出LLMP-UCB算法，但实验发现轻量级数值bandit在文本嵌入上表现更优且成本更低，嵌入维度可作为探索-利用平衡的杠杆，并提出几何诊断方法指导LLM与轻量级bandit的选择。
AI.motivation: 解决在非情节顺序决策问题中，使用LLM进行推理计算成本高且难以获取不确定性估计的问题。
AI.method: 引入LLMP-UCB算法，通过重复推理从LLM获取不确定性估计；使用轻量级数值bandit在文本嵌入（密集或Matryoshka）上操作；提出基于臂嵌入的几何诊断方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，轻量级数值bandit在文本嵌入上的准确率与LLM解决方案相当或更高，成本仅为其一小部分；嵌入维度是探索-利用平衡的实用杠杆，可实现成本-性能权衡。
AI.conclusion: LLMP-UCB算法在成本效益上不如轻量级数值bandit；嵌入维度可作为探索-利用平衡的实用杠杆；提出基于嵌入的几何诊断方法来决定使用LLM驱动推理还是轻量级数值bandit；为金融服务业中具有成本效益、不确定性感知的决策系统提供了原则性部署框架。

title: CRFT: Consistent-Recurrent Feature Flow Transformer for Cross-Modal Image Registration
summary: We present Consistent-Recurrent Feature Flow Transformer (CRFT), a unified coarse-to-fine framework based on feature flow learning for robust cross-modal image registration. CRFT learns a modality-independent feature flow representation within a transformer-based architecture that jointly performs feature alignment and flow estimation. The coarse stage establishes global correspondences through multi-scale feature correlation, while the fine stage refines local details via hierarchical feature fusion and adaptive spatial reasoning. To enhance geometric adaptability, an iterative discrepancy-guided attention mechanism with a Spatial Geometric Transform (SGT) recurrently refines the flow field, progressively capturing subtle spatial inconsistencies and enforcing feature-level consistency. This design enables accurate alignment under large affine and scale variations while maintaining structural coherence across modalities. Extensive experiments on diverse cross-modal datasets demonstrate that CRFT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art registration methods in both accuracy and robustness. Beyond registration, CRFT provides a generalizable paradigm for multimodal spatial correspondence, offering broad applicability to remote sensing, autonomous navigation, and medical imaging. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/NEU-Liuxuecong/CRFT.

AI.tldr: CRFT是一种基于特征流学习的统一粗到细框架，用于鲁棒的跨模态图像注册。该方法在Transformer架构内学习模态无关的特征流表示，通过粗阶段建立全局对应关系，细阶段细化局部细节，并采用迭代差异引导注意力机制与空间几何变换 recurrently 细化流场。
AI.motivation: 跨模态图像配准在遥感、自动驾驶和医学成像等领域具有重要应用，但现有方法在处理大仿射和尺度变化时缺乏鲁棒性，需要一种能同时实现特征对齐和流估计的统一框架。

AI.result: 在多样跨模态数据集上的广泛实验表明，CRFT在准确性和鲁棒性方面始终优于最先进注册方法。该方法还为多模态空间对应提供了可泛化范式，适用于遥感、自动驾驶和医学成像。

title: Let Geometry GUIDE: Layer-wise Unrolling of Geometric Priors in Multimodal LLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in 2D visual tasks but still exhibit limited physical spatial awareness when processing real-world visual streams. Recently, feed-forward geometric foundation models, which implicitly extract geometric priors, have provided a new pathway to address this issue. However, existing geometry-aware MLLMs are predominantly constrained by the paradigm of single deep-layer extraction and input-level fusion. This flattened fusion leads to the loss of local geometric details and causes semantic mismatches in the early layers. To break this bottleneck, we propose GUIDE (Geometric Unrolling Inside MLLM Early-layers), a progressive geometric priors injection framework. GUIDE performs multi-level sampling within the geometric encoder, comprehensively capturing multi-granularity features ranging from local edges to global topologies. Subsequently, we rigorously align and fuse these multi-level geometric priors step-by-step with the early layers of the MLLM. Building upon the injection of multi-granularity geometric information, this design guides the model to progressively learn the 2D-to-3D transitional process. Furthermore, we introduce a context-aware gating that enables the model to fetch requisite spatial cues based on current semantics, thereby maximizing the utilization efficiency of spatial priors and effectively suppressing redundant geometric noise. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GUIDE significantly outperforms existing baselines on multiple complex spatial reasoning and perception tasks, establishing a novel paradigm for integrating 3D geometric priors into large models.

AI.tldr: 提出GUIDE框架，通过多层次几何采样和逐步对齐融合机制，将3D几何先验注入多模态大语言模型的早期层，提升模型的空间推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有几何感知多模态大语言模型受限于单深层提取范式和平面融合方式，导致局部几何细节丢失和早期层语义不匹配问题。
AI.method: 1. 在几何编码器中进行多层次采样，捕获从局部边缘到全局拓扑的多粒度特征；2. 逐步将多层次几何先验与MLLM早期层对齐融合；3. 引入上下文感知门控机制，根据当前语义获取空间线索，抑制冗余几何噪声。
AI.result: GUIDE在多个复杂空间推理和感知任务上显著优于现有基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 建立了将3D几何先验集成到大模型的新范式，为提升多模态模型的空间感知能力提供了有效途径。

title: HybridKV: Hybrid KV Cache Compression for Efficient Multimodal Large Language Model Inference
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced unified reasoning over text, images, and videos, but their inference is hindered by the rapid growth of key-value (KV) caches. Each visual input expands into thousands of tokens, causing caches to scale linearly with context length and remain resident in GPU memory throughout decoding, which leads to prohibitive memory overhead and latency even on high-end GPUs. A common solution is to compress caches under a fixed allocated budget at different granularities: token-level uniformly discards less important tokens, layer-level varies retention across layers, and head-level redistributes budgets across heads. Yet these approaches stop at allocation and overlook the heterogeneous behaviors of attention heads that require distinct compression strategies. We propose HybridKV, a hybrid KV cache compression framework that integrates complementary strategies in three stages: heads are first classified into static or dynamic types using text-centric attention; then a top-down budget allocation scheme hierarchically assigns KV budgets; finally, static heads are compressed by text-prior pruning and dynamic heads by chunk-wise retrieval. Experiments on 11 multimodal benchmarks with Qwen2.5-VL-7B show that HybridKV reduces KV cache memory by up to $7.9\times$ and achieves $1.52\times$ faster decoding, with almost no performance drop or even higher relative to the full-cache MLLM.

AI.tldr: 一种针对多模态大语言模型的KV缓存混合压缩框架，通过将注意力头分类为静态/动态类型并采用差异化压缩策略，实现最高7.9倍内存降低和1.52倍加速，同时保持性能。
AI.motivation: 随着多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)处理文本、图像和视频的能力提升，KV缓存快速增长。每个视觉输入扩展为数千个token，导致缓存随上下文长度线性增长，占用GPU内存，严重制约推理效率。现有压缩方法仅关注分配策略，忽视了注意力头在压缩需求上的异质性。
AI.method: 提出HybridKV混合KV缓存压缩框架，包含三个阶段：1)基于文本中心注意力将头分类为静态或动态类型；2)自顶向下分配KV预算；3)静态头采用文本优先剪枝，动态头采用分块检索压缩。
AI.result: 在11个多模态基准测试上，使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型，HybridKV实现KV缓存内存降低最高7.9倍，解码加速1.52倍，性能几乎无损失或有所提升。
AI.conclusion: HybridKV通过识别注意力头的异质性并采用差异化压缩策略，有效解决了MLLMs中KV缓存膨胀问题，在显著降低内存和提升速度的同时保持模型性能，为多模态推理效率优化提供了新思路。

title: GaussianGrow: Geometry-aware Gaussian Growing from 3D Point Clouds with Text Guidance
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting has demonstrated superior performance in rendering efficiency and quality, yet the generation of 3D Gaussians still remains a challenge without proper geometric priors. Existing methods have explored predicting point maps as geometric references for inferring Gaussian primitives, while the unreliable estimated geometries may lead to poor generations. In this work, we introduce GaussianGrow, a novel approach that generates 3D Gaussians by learning to grow them from easily accessible 3D point clouds, naturally enforcing geometric accuracy in Gaussian generation. Specifically, we design a text-guided Gaussian growing scheme that leverages a multi-view diffusion model to synthesize consistent appearances from input point clouds for supervision. To mitigate artifacts caused by fusing neighboring views, we constrain novel views generated at non-preset camera poses identified in overlapping regions across different views. For completing the hard-to-observe regions, we propose to iteratively detect the camera pose by observing the largest un-grown regions in point clouds and inpainting them by inpainting the rendered view with a pretrained 2D diffusion model. The process continues until complete Gaussians are generated. We extensively evaluate GaussianGrow on text-guided Gaussian generation from synthetic and even real-scanned point clouds. Project Page: https://weiqi-zhang.github.io/GaussianGrow

AI.tldr: GaussianGrow是一种从3D点云生长3D高斯的新方法，通过多视图扩散模型和多视图约束来生成几何准确的高斯体，用于文本引导的高斯生成。
AI.motivation: 3D Gaussian Splatting在渲染效率和品质方面表现优异，但3D高斯的生成仍然缺乏适当的几何先验。现有方法通过预测点图作为几何参考来推断高斯图元，但不可靠的几何估计可能导致较差的生成效果。

AI.result: 在合成和真实扫描的点云上进行了广泛的评估，证明了GaussianGrow在文本引导高斯生成任务上的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: GaussianGrow通过从易获取的3D点云学习生长高斯，自然地保证了高斯生成的几何准确性，为3D Gaussian Splatting的生成提供了新的思路。

title: Beyond Semantics: Disentangling Information Scope in Sparse Autoencoders for CLIP
summary: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have emerged as a powerful tool for interpreting the internal representations of CLIP vision encoders, yet existing analyses largely focus on the semantic meaning of individual features. We introduce information scope as a complementary dimension of interpretability that characterizes how broadly an SAE feature aggregates visual evidence, ranging from localized, patch-specific cues to global, image-level signals. We observe that some SAE features respond consistently across spatial perturbations, while others shift unpredictably with minor input changes, indicating a fundamental distinction in their underlying scope. To quantify this, we propose the Contextual Dependency Score (CDS), which separates positionally stable local scope features from positionally variant global scope features. Our experiments show that features of different information scopes exert systematically different influences on CLIP's predictions and confidence. These findings establish information scope as a critical new axis for understanding CLIP representations and provide a deeper diagnostic view of SAE-derived features.

AI.tldr: 本文提出信息scope（信息范围）作为解释CLIP视觉编码器SAE特征的新维度，通过上下文依赖性评分(CDS)区分局部范围和全局范围特征，发现不同信息范围的特征对CLIP预测和置信度有系统性不同影响。
AI.motivation: 现有SAE分析主要关注特征的语义含义，缺乏对特征空间聚合范围的系统理解。作者引入"信息范围"概念，区分patch级局部信号和图像级全局信号，以揭示特征聚合视觉证据的广度差异。
AI.method: 提出上下文依赖性评分(CDS)方法，通过空间扰动测试特征的位置稳定性：响应一致的为局部范围特征(positionally stable local scope)，随输入变化而转移的为全局范围特征(positionally variant global scope)。
AI.result: 实验表明：1)不同信息范围的SAE特征在空间扰动下表现差异显著；2)局部范围和全局范围特征对CLIP预测和置信度产生系统性不同的影响。
AI.conclusion: 信息范围是理解CLIP表征的关键新轴，为SAE特征提供了更深入的诊断视角，填补了特征语义分析之外的 interpretability 空白。

title: Towards Trustworthy Report Generation: A Deep Research Agent with Progressive Confidence Estimation and Calibration
summary: As agent-based systems continue to evolve, deep research agents are capable of automatically generating research-style reports across diverse domains. While these agents promise to streamline information synthesis and knowledge exploration, existing evaluation frameworks-typically based on subjective dimensions-fail to capture a critical aspect of report quality: trustworthiness. In open-ended research scenarios where ground-truth answers are unavailable, current evaluation methods cannot effectively measure the epistemic confidence of generated content, making calibration difficult and leaving users susceptible to misleading or hallucinated information. To address this limitation, we propose a novel deep research agent that incorporates progressive confidence estimation and calibration within the report generation pipeline. Our system leverages a deliberative search model, featuring deep retrieval and multi-hop reasoning to ground outputs in verifiable evidence while assigning confidence scores to individual claims. Combined with a carefully designed workflow, this approach produces trustworthy reports with enhanced transparency. Experimental results and case studies demonstrate that our method substantially improves interpretability and significantly increases user trust.

AI.tldr: 针对深度研究智能体生成的报告缺乏可信度评估机制的问题，提出了一种结合渐进式置信度估计与校准的深度研究智能体系统，通过审议式搜索模型、多跳推理和证据锚定技术，为生成内容分配置信度分数，提升报告的可信赖性和透明度。
AI.motivation: 现有评估框架基于主观维度，无法捕捉报告质量的关键维度——可信赖性；在开放域研究场景中缺乏真实答案，当前方法无法有效衡量生成内容的认知置信度，导致校准困难，用户容易受到误导或虚假信息的影响。
AI.method: 采用 Deliberative Search Model（审议式搜索模型），结合深度检索和多跳推理技术，将输出内容锚定在可验证的证据上，同时为每个论断分配置信度分数，并设计了精心策划的工作流程。

AI.conclusion: 所提出的深度研究智能体通过渐进式置信度估计和校准机制，有效提升了研究报告中信息的可信度和透明度，为开放域研究场景中的信息可信度评估提供了新的解决思路。
